programme.title: Acapulco Shore

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Luego del accidente de Fernando, Potro decide acompañarlo al hospital y las consecuencias de su caída no se hacen esperar. Una vez más llega el "Boss" a la casa para enviar a los Shore a un nuevo trabajo.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Comienza un nuevo día en la casa Shore y la llegada del Boss emociona a casi todos los integrantes de las casa quienes salen a disfrutar de un nuevo y divertido día laboral. Al caer la noche los Shore deciden ir a un sitio más tranquilo.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Una invitada colombiana llega a la casa shore mientras Fernando tiene que irse de Acapulco para ver a su medico y decidir si puede terminar sus vacaciones en familia. Todo esta listo para la iniciación de los nuevos integrantes de la casa.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore

programme.title: Acapulco Shore

programme.title: Aurora

programme.title: Aurora
programme.desc: Lorenzo sufre al pensar que su hijo Martín se acerque a la mujer que amó, un encuentro posible ya que él trabaja en la clínica donde ella duerme. Natalia enfrenta fantasmas del pasado. Cuando comienza la descongelación, Aurora sueña con Lorenzo.

programme.title: Aurora

programme.title: Aurora
programme.desc: Martín sueña con un amor que nace de una mirada que hechiza, pero desconoce que su padre se reencuentra con la mujer que le robó el corazón 20 años atrás. Aurora se escapa de la clínica y se entera de muchas cosas. Descubre quién es Martín.

programme.title: Aurora
programme.desc: Aurora descubre el odio que su hija Blanca siente por ella tras una pelea con su madre. A Lorenzo lo atormenta el recuerdo de un rostro y le cuenta a Martín que vio a Aurora en la clínica, pero este le asegura que se trata de la hija de Aurora.

programme.title: Aurora
programme.desc: Aurora le confiesa sus sentimientos a Lorenzo y le habla del dolor de una mujer que jamás lo traicionó. Blanca se va de la casa, pero más tarde le da una oportunidad a su madre sin saberlo. Vanesa le reprocha a Natalia el haberse quedado con Lorenzo.

programme.title: Aurora

programme.title: Aurora
programme.desc: Un beso de Aurora le devuelve a Lorenzo el deseo del pasado. No puede imaginarse que Federico llegará para atormentarlos y despertar celos guardados. Vanesa llega a la casa de Aurora para conocer a la hija y se sorprende con el parecido con su amiga.

programme.title: Aurora

programme.title: Aurora
programme.desc: Una misma mujer despierta sentimientos encontrados entre padre e hijo y, sin pensarlo, su mirada los convierte en rivales entre el pasado y el presente. Inés quiere que Aurora y Federico se pongan de acuerdo, pero este trata de sobrepasarse con Aurora.

programme.title: Aurora
programme.desc: Vanesa le dice a Aurora que Lorenzo nunca se enamoró de su madre y que todo era un plan para quedarse con su fortuna. Ahora Aurora quiere revivir en Lorenzo el amor que sintió en el pasado. Lo que ella no sabe es que un accidente está por suceder.

programme.title: Aurora

programme.title: Lockup: New Mexico: Extended Stay
programme.desc: A low-level offender increases his sentence from 18 months to 16-and-a-half years after three separate counts of aggravated battery on an officer; the same inmate was banned from even non-contact visits after an affair with a prison staff nurse.

programme.title: Lockup: New Mexico: Extended Stay
programme.desc: The Penitentiary of New Mexico houses both low level and max-security inmates; Level 6 inmates like Chris Shiverdecker, who has a Macgyver-like prison reputation, are still eligible for hearings that could change custody level and security status.

programme.title: Lockup: New Mexico: Extended Stay
programme.desc: Inmates who become disruptive at the Penitentiary of New Mexico are transferred to the lock-up units in level 5 or 6; the trouble is, their behavior doesn't always improve; this is a lesson rookie officer Amy lee is learning the hard way.

programme.title: Lockup: New Mexico: Extended Stay
programme.desc: Prison officials initiate a shakedown after gang members in Level 6 overpower an officer in the recreation area, take her keys and stab a rival gang member; this type of incident simply adds to the tension already felt in the supermax facility.

programme.title: Lockup: New Mexico: Extended Stay
programme.desc: For some inmates, the only way out of prison is "paroling legit," or leaving in a body bag; others earn a lump sum of good time by completing programs or holding a prison job, while a few will take any chance to try to escape.

programme.title: Lockup: San Quentin: Extended Stay
programme.desc: Inside San Quentin, gangs, drugs and sheer boredom make up a violent mix; Scanvinski Hymes has been in prison since he was 18 years old; almost 20 years later, he's racked up the highest number of violent offenses in California prison history.

programme.title: Lockup: San Quentin: Extended Stay
programme.desc: San Quentin has one of the longest histories of violence; whether it's an inmate fresh off the street, a gang dropout in protective custody, or an officer trying to maintain order, they've all fallen victim to violent attacks.

programme.title: Lockup: San Quentin: Extended Stay
programme.desc: At San Quentin, every inmate is marked with a security level based on his crime and prison behavior; serving as a reception center, the overpopulated prison must house a dangerous mix of levels within close proximity of one another.

programme.title: Lockup: New Mexico: Extended Stay
programme.desc: At the Penitentiary of New Mexico, officers are outnumbered and the inmates are unpredictable, especially in Level 6, the maximum-security facility; it's where the deputy warden says "the worst of the worst" are housed.

programme.desc: Gon comes up with a plan to beat Razor, and it requires Killua's help.

programme.title: HUNTERxHUNTER
programme.desc: Gon, Killua and Hisoka face Razor head on, and a winner will finally be crowned in this dodge ball showdown!

programme.title: HUNTERxHUNTER
programme.desc: Tsezguerra suggests that Gon and his friends should continue training while his team distracts Genthru.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Bast's Mariah, Part 1
programme.desc: On the way to Luxor, Joseph notices an electrical outlet set in a rock. Fascinated by the rare sight, Joseph goes in for a closer look and gets shocked. Though he seems fine afterward, soon all manner of small accidents begin to occur around him.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Bast's Mariah, Part 2
programme.desc: Due to the powers of an enemy Stand, Joseph's body becomes magnetized. While chasing after the woman he suspects is the Stand user, Joseph learns that Avdol has also become magnetized from touching a different electrical outlet.

programme.title: HUNTERxHUNTER
programme.desc: Gon and his friends meet the pirate boss Razor, but are overwhelmed by his power.

programme.title: HUNTERxHUNTER
programme.desc: Gon and his friends team up with Hisoka and Goreinu to challenge Razor again. Also helping out is Team Tsezguerra.

programme.title: HUNTERxHUNTER
programme.desc: Gon comes up with a plan to beat Razor, and it requires Killua's help.

programme.title: HUNTERxHUNTER
programme.desc: Gon, Killua and Hisoka face Razor head on, and a winner will finally be crowned in this dodge ball showdown!

programme.title: HUNTERxHUNTER
programme.desc: Tsezguerra suggests that Gon and his friends should continue training while his team distracts Genthru.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Bast's Mariah, Part 1
programme.desc: On the way to Luxor, Joseph notices an electrical outlet set in a rock. Fascinated by the rare sight, Joseph goes in for a closer look and gets shocked. Though he seems fine afterward, soon all manner of small accidents begin to occur around him.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Bast's Mariah, Part 2
programme.desc: Due to the powers of an enemy Stand, Joseph's body becomes magnetized. While chasing after the woman he suspects is the Stand user, Joseph learns that Avdol has also become magnetized from touching a different electrical outlet.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Set's Alessi, Part 1
programme.desc: With Joseph and Avdol busy fighting Mariah, Jotaro and Polnareff get concerned about why they haven't shown up yet. As the two search Luxor, Polnareff senses someone following them and confronts the man.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Set's Alessi, Part 2
programme.desc: The power of Alessi's Stand "Set" has turned Polnareff back into a child, leaving him confused and alone. A passerby named Marena takes the boy into her home to help him, but they are followed by Alessi and his terrible powers.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: D'Arby the Gambler, Part 1
programme.desc: After a long journey, Jotaro and his friends finally reach Cairo. They begin asking about the location of DIO's palace and find one man who says he has information, but will only answer if the group can beat him in a game.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: D'Arby the Gambler, Part 2
programme.desc: After losing to D'Arby, Joseph and Polnareff have their souls taken. In order to have their souls returned, Jotaro shows off Star Platinum's powers before beginning a match with D'Arby, warning him that cheating won't work.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Hol Horse and Mondatta, Part 1
programme.desc: Hol Horse arrives at Cairo in order to pursue Jotaro and the others. He has joined forces with another partner and is after the lives of Jotaro and crew once more. What's more, his new partner is none other than Mondatta.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Hol Horse and Mondatta, Part 2
programme.desc: Following Mondatta's prediction, Hol Horse sticks his fingers into Polnareff's nose, but he doesn't know what to do from there. Making matters worse, Jotaro and the others show up in search of Polnareff, forcing Hol Horse into a tough spot.

programme.title: Black Jack
programme.desc: A poacher traps an endangered Iriomote cat on a remote island and boards a ferry. Onboard is Black Jack and Pinoko, along with a haughty politician. The wild cat escapes, causing a ruckus, and injuring the politician and a passenger's baby.

programme.title: Black Jack
programme.desc: Sharaku is a middle-schooler who is often bullied. One day, Pinoko saves him from Kong, a bully, and they become friends. Sharaku suddenly becomes gravely sick and Black Jack is called into the hospital to operate on him.

programme.title: Black Jack
programme.desc: At Tom, their favorite cafe, Black Jack and Pinoko encounter a boy with a physical disability who is intently reading a book by a handicapped person. Inspired by the memoir, he decides to walk 350km from Hiroshima to Osaka by himself.

programme.title: Black Jack
programme.desc: Pinoko and Sharaku are playing in a park when a stray dog grabs Pinoko's purse and runs off. They chase after the stray, but the dog is suddenly hit by a car outside of the park. Pinoko gets Black Jack to operate on the dog, and is successful.

programme.title: HUNTERxHUNTER
programme.desc: Gon continues to hone his special ability by using the Enhancer, Emitter and Transmuter aura types.

programme.title: HUNTERxHUNTER
programme.desc: Killua passes the Hunter Exam on his second attempt and returns to the game. Once reunited, Gon, Killua and Biscuit begin collecting cards steadily.

programme.title: HUNTERxHUNTER
programme.desc: In order to stop Genthru from clearing the game, Gon and Killua are asked to join an alliance.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Philip Serrell and Tom Scott start the day in Southampton, then head east through Fareham, Portsmouth and Southsea, to auction at Wareham in Dorset.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Paul Laidlaw and David Harper begin in the town of Windermere, weaving through West Burton and Middleham to auction in East Boldon in Tyne and Wear.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Paul Laidlaw and David Harper start out in Sunderland before making their way through Durham to auction in the North Yorkshire town of Northallerton.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Paul Laidlaw and David Harper begin day three in Hexham, Northumberland, before heading across the border for an auction in Dumfries.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Paul Laidlaw and David Harper begin the day in New Abbey, in Dumfries and Galloway, before heading to auction in Paisley in Renfrewshire, where David has quite a bit of catching up to do!

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Paul Laidlaw and David Harper begin their final leg in Glasgow before making their way through Falkirk and Dunblane, ending at auction in Dundee.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: It's the start of a new week for road trip legends Charlie Ross and Thomas Plant. They begin in Watchet, Somerset before heading to auction in Frome.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Charlie Ross and Thomas Plant begin day two in the beautiful city of Bath, then head up through the Cotswolds to auction in Stroud, Gloucestershire.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Charlie Ross and Thomas Plant begin the day in Tewkesbury, Gloucestershire, then wind through Worcestershire to an auction in Wrexham, North Wales.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Thomas Plant and Charlie Ross start the day in Church Stretton, Shropshire stopping at Welshpool, Oswestry and Wrexham before auction in Minsterley.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Charlie Ross and Thomas Plant travel from the West Midlands, through Lichfield and Walsall, ending at their final auction showdown in Bedford.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: It's the start of a new week for antiques experts Anita Manning and James Braxton. Braving the inclement weather, they head out on the road through Stamford, Lincolnshire, and Boston.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: On the second leg of their road trip through Norfolk, James Braxton tries his hand at bell ringing in Norwich and Anita Manning travels to Holt to visit a unique Arts & Craft stately home.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Antiques experts Anita Manning and James Braxton travel through Essex on the third leg of their road trip. James is feeling flush following success at the last auction -- can Anita catch him up?

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow UK
programme.desc: Michael and the experts return to Cliveden's gardens in Buckinghamshire and discover a ladies bureau, an 'eccentrically large' barometer, an unusual 'McMickey' Mouse, and a silver cruet set made by one of the great silversmiths, worth £30,000.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow UK
programme.desc: Michael and the experts travel north to Lochgilphead in Argyll and Bute. Among the finds are a valuable painting, a pair of Staffordshire zebras, a painting of a young girl by Scottish artist Hamilton McKenzie, and a carved bone ship.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow UK
programme.desc: Michael takes the experts to Salford near Manchester and discovers an album full of valuable photographs, Zulu wedding beads accompanied by some rare photos, an American scrimshaw whale's tooth, and a drawing by the local artist LS Lowry.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow UK
programme.desc: Michael and the team are at the turrets and terraces of Eastnor Castle in Herefordshire, where they find some bizarre objects including a wooden bicycle, a huge pocket knife, an embroidered egg, a World War I pack, and the first All Blacks rugby shirt.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow UK
programme.desc: Michael and the team return to Eastnor Castle in Herefordshire with expert Paul Atterbury. Exciting finds include a 17th-century wine bottle, suffragette memorabilia, a bust of General Gordon, and a much-loved Victorian dressing case.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow UK
programme.desc: Michael and the team are in Eston, Cleveland, where they find a sculpted elephant by Eduardo Paolozzi, a Victorian painting, the first commercially produced toy robot, a collection of craft jewelry, and a fiber-glass chair.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow UK
programme.desc: Michael and the team are in Melksham, Wiltshire. Among the items are a Cossack dagger, a drawing by Edmund Dulac, a dog collar made in 1784, and a collection of bedpans and a gold box found in the mud in Wales.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow UK
programme.desc: Michael and the experts visit Caernarfon in North Wales and examine a stunning 17th-century lantern clock, a set of chairs, a jade necklace, and a 200-year-old bleeding bowl.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow UK
programme.desc: Michael and the experts visit Rugby, Warwickshire, where the finds include a collection of suffragette material, a signed Rolling Stones album, a post box from Penny Lane in Liverpool, and a Turkish rifle with Greek inscriptions.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow UK
programme.desc: Michael and Paul Atterbury return to London's Victoria and Albert Museum to showcase previously unseen sequences from other roadshows, including a collection of Winston Churchill mementos, and an album of Spanish watercolors.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow UK
programme.desc: Michael and the experts visit Forde Abbey in Somerset, where the finds include a second-century cameo ring, two ebony busts, and a reflecting telescope worth thousands.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow UK

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep12
programme.desc: Catalina hace el amor con Albeiro después de embriagarlo para que no se note la pérdida de su virginidad. Catalina y Jessica se devuelven a Bogotá. El hombre oscuro contrata a Bairon para matar a un político.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep13
programme.desc: El hombre oscuro le da la misión a Bairon y a su compañero de eliminar al magistrado con un tiempo límite de un mes. Catalina seduce a Octavio. El hombre las echa de la casa. Las mujeres se encuentran con el doctor para la cirugía de los senos.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep14
programme.desc: A Catalina le realizan la operación, las mujeres son echadas del apartamento de Octavio pues él se ha enamorado de ella y se percata de una mentira por parte de ella. La mujer se ve con el Titi el cual se entusiasma por verla operada.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep15
programme.desc: Catalina empieza con su cronograma de trabajo como prepago. Albeiro se encuentra en Bogotá con Octavio, se entera de muchas cosas de su novia. El guardaespaldas le cuenta a su patrón Marcial haberse enamorado de Catalina.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep16
programme.desc: Catalina convence a su novio de estar juiciosa en la capital, los dos hacen el amor. Hilda se entera y cachetea a su hija. Catalina se ve con el Titi y lo golpea, el mafioso la manda a matar junto a Jessica. Las mujeres se refugian donde Marcial.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep17
programme.desc: Catalina acepta vivir donde Marcial para ocultarse del Titi. Albeiro se muda donde Hilda, comienzan su relación amorosa. Catalina entra al concurso de ''Miss Chica Linda'', Marcial trata de asegurar la victoria de la mujer.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep18
programme.desc: Mauricio advierte a Catalina del peligro que posee si no le quita las prótesis. La gente del barrio ven el reinado, la mujer pelea con otra concursante, Catalina no gana. La mujer vuelve a su pueblo, se percata que Albeiro vive ahora con su madre

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep19
programme.desc: Catalina se ve con el Titi y le pide disculpas, los dos hacen el amor. Marcial se extraña por la pérdida de la mujer al no haber sido recogida por sus hombres. Marcial le propone matrimonio a Catalina, ella acepta.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep20
programme.desc: Catalina se entera de la muerte de su hermano por medio de la Diabla. Marcial se entera por medio de Pelambre que su mujer anda besándose con Albeiro, el hombre lo manda asesinar. Catalina descubre el romance de su novio y su mamá.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep21
programme.desc: El Titi es capturado y extraditado por la DEA. A Catalina le extraen la prótesis por el dolor tan fuerte que estaba sufriendo. Jessica hace el amor con Marcial, le cuenta cosas malas de su amiga. Catalina es llevada a urgencias por Pelambre.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep22
programme.desc: Catalina es informada por el médico que no puede volver a utilizar implantes por lo menos en un lapso de dos años. Marcial presenta a Jessica como su nueva esposa. El capitán Salgado es asesinado. Jessica se despide de su amiga con una excusa.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep23
programme.desc: Catalina visita a su familia. La mujer se ve con Pelambre, se entera el romance de Marcial y Jessica. La mujer le pide al guardaespaldas matar a Jessica en un restaurante, sin embargo Catalina se hace pasar por ella y es asesinada en vez de la Diabla

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep1
programme.desc: Conozca la historia de Catalina, una joven que cegada por su ambición y las malas influencias llegará a un paraíso al que jamás desearía haber entrado.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep2
programme.desc: Albeiro es seducido por el cuerpo de la madre de Catalina. Catalina es violada en el establo por los hombres de Mariño. Bairon rechaza a Jimena pues él se percata que ella se va diariamente como acompañante con los mafiosos.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep3
programme.desc: Bairon es atacado, el hombre se oculta en la casa de su madre Hilda. Caballo busca a Catalina para matarla y que no se entere su patrón que él le quito la virginidad a la mujer. Albeiro le propone matrimonio a su novia. La Diabla habla con los capos

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep4
programme.desc: La Diabla le consigue las modelos a Cardona y Morón. Albeiro le propone a Catalina irse a vivir juntos, ella lo rechaza. Catalina se entera de que está embarazada y aborta. Jessica lleva a su amiga a una fiesta de modelos realizada por mafiosos

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon heads to middle-of-nowhere Tennessee to rescue The Wanted Saloon, whose remote location is just the first of many challenges.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: A twerking, drinking, fighting staff threatens a once-thriving bar, leaving Ashley and Robert Gaddy's future at a crossroads.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon returns to Puerto Rico, where he used to live, to rescue a bar destroyed by Hurricane Maria and to help revive the rest of the community.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon brings in culinary expert Aaron McCargo Jr. and mixologist Mia Mastroianni to help a Florida couple's bar bounce back after years of failure under their son's management.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: An unappealing name is just the first of many problems plaguing Fatballs Sports Bar & Grill, where Jon must get a belligerent owner to accept responsibility.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: An industrious immigrant with a history of business success bites off more than he can chew when he buys Blue Water and takes a hands-off management approach.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: A daughter must grapple with the loss of her father as she struggles to preserve his legacy and save his bar, Cap'n Odie's Lounge.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon must help a struggling establishment figure out if it's a club, a restaurant, or a bar, in the highly competitive market of Las Vegas.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: A Las Vegas dive struggles under an owner who makes more enemies than friends, so it's up to Jon to step in and teach a lesson on civility.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon looks to rescue the bars of tomorrow by giving hospitality students at UNLV a one-week crash course on running a successful bar.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon heads back to Puerto Rico to help brother-and-sister bar owners who saw their business devastated by Hurricane Maria.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon must get an overly-emotional bar owner to stop wallowing and take action to save his bar.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: A pair of brothers can't see eye-to-eye on how to run their business, so one of them takes a run.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon heads to a tiny bar in China Grove, Texas, to help a couple on the verge of retirement stop enabling their belligerent daughter.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: After Matt is stung by a poisonous fish, he and Mitch find a village where a young woman offers to help them, resulting in all three of them running from her jealous suitor. Logan’s selfish behavior puts his relationship with Caroline in jeopardy.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Kaye is reunited with old flame Wes Masters. Stephanie undergoes surgery for melanoma performed by her doctor and boyfriend Tom, who plans a romantic surprise for her when surgery is over. Caroline catches Logan cheating on her with Neely.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: While in search of underwater treasure, things take a deadly turn when Stephanie and Cody are confronted by a pair of drug smugglers. Back at headquarters, Newman faces off against a different type of treasure hunter…

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Logan decides to write and direct a low-budget action flick at the beach using a drugged shark as the villain, but things get out of hand when the shark Is not properly sedated!

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: When Mitch Judges the Miss Malibu Beach Bikini Contest, his willpower is tested by two competitors who will do anything to get his vote. Later, Cody designs the "Windjet,” an innovative, new lifesaving boat/waverunner combination.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: CJ befriends Max, a homeless eccentric who claims that he was once a famous Hollywood Costume designer. When Max dies suddenly, CJ learns he was rich and has left her $4 million in his will. Manny joins junior lifeguards.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: At the annual Baywatch Lifeguard Bachelor Auction, Mitch is "bought" for $5,000 by a wealthy socialite. The relationship gets complicated when they get stranded on an island and their social status is reversed. Cody joins a local roller hockey team.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: LA is in the throes of a severe heat wave! Hundreds of thousands of people head to the beach. Lifeguarding gets more chaotic for the team when the Secret Service shows up to inform them that the President is going to go jogging on the beach.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: To sponsor the Special Olympics at the beach, Mitch hires MTV DJ Jenny McCarthy to throw "Beachblast:" a live televised tournament. After being evicted from his apartment, Cody moves in with CJ and Caroline, creating a surplus of sexual tension.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: CJ's mother, a former Las Vegas showgirl, arrives in town seeking CJ's help to get away from her mobster ex-boyfriend. When CJ and her mom are held hostage on a remote beach, it is up to Mitch and Cody to rescue them.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Australia's Uncle Toby's International Ironman Competition comes to LA. The Baywatch girls think all is fair in sports and convince the guys that they should compete as equals, setting the stage for a series of pranks between the men and women.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Controversy generated by Donna's appearance in Playboy magazine divides the Baywatch lifeguards. When an earthquake triggers a rockslide, burying a bus full of junior lifeguards, Mitch, Samantha, Cody and Donna try to rescue them.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: After rescuing a group of fishermen and tourists from a pier fire, Samantha and L.A. fire chief Captain Huntingdon form an elite joint Search and Rescue unit. Meanwhile, Cody asks CJ to paint his portrait, and Mitch receives some strange PI work.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Donna and Caroline work with Heal the Bay after a recent rainstorm washes inland pollutants into the waters off Santa Monica. Mitch falls ill after he unknowing swims over sunken drums of toxic chemicals.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Janice & Wayne spoke with Dr. Phil as daughter Darbi, 16, had been missing for 24 days. Dr. Phil asked if the parents were more focused on their hatred toward each other than working together to find their child. Hours later, they got a phonecall. Pt. 2

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Gina asked Dr. Phil for help with her daughter Alexis, saying she was kidnapped by her survivalist boyfriend David. As the story unfolds, another layer surfaces, allegations of molestation by a family member. Find out who, and will a polygraph tell all?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Mom Jessica says husband Mike is a controlling narcissist. Chloe, 16, & Zoey, 18, say dad shattered their dancing dreams. Mike says Jessica puts the girls in the middle. Dr. Phil tells mom & dad what couples need to do with children as a marriage ends.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Robin says ex-husband, Daniel, kidnapped their two daughters. Daniel claims false--his goal is to protect his daughters! Robin says Daniel "convinced" their daughters to leave home & meet him on the corner with only the clothes on their backs. Pt. 1

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Jordan Bleimeyer, 5, was found severely malnourished locked inside a small closet under the stairs of a Houston home. His father, Bradley & stepmother, Tammi, were charged with felony child endangerment. Windy Hall, Jordan's bio mom talks to Dr. Phil.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: David says he's in love with "Maria", a Christian woman from Texas with a $10 million inheritance. Even though they've never met, he's paid $25,000 to their lawyer to assist her in receiving her inheritance. Dr. Phil investigates "Maria": real or catfish?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil talks to mothers-in-law feuding with their sons-in-law and the relatives caught in the crossfire of these ongoing feuds.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: One day off heroin Sarah begins painful withdrawals. Tecoa struggles with drug cravings while two weeks clean and six months pregnant. Are Dr. Phil's efforts sabotaged between the twins? Dr. Phil shows the girls a terrifying look into their future. Part 2

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil continues with Sandi, 60, discussing her online relationship with Peter, 22. Dr. Phil speaks to Peter in Nigeria via satellite & he insists he loves Sandi. Will Sandi listen to her daughters' concerns, or will she fly to Nigeria to marry Peter?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Kala Brown made national headlines when she was discovered alive 2 months after disappearng in South Carolina. She was kidnapped, locked in a metal storage container & chained on the neck by a serial killer. Kala speaks about her life in captivity.Pt. 1

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil continues an incredible story of a woman brutally raped at age 15. Loretta identified the alleged rapist and helped police put him behind bars. But her world was rocked 14 years later when the man, Dean, was exonerated due to DNA evidence. Pt. 2

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: From marital spats to disagreements on discipline, learn the biggest mistakes you may be making. Plus, a money expert reveals financial faux pas.

programme.desc: When the Clampetts decide they want to go home for Possum Day, Mr. Drysdale attempts to put together a Possum Day in Beverly Hills.

programme.desc: The Clampetts (thereafter Mr. Drysdale) mistake the new neighbor's maidservant for the actual owner. Granny tries her best to set Jed up with her.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny wants to learn to drive the truck but can't get used to modern day contraptions. A horse is more of what she wants and Mr. Drysdale gets her one, a professional race horse.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La BAU investiga a las víctimas que documentaban sus vidas personales y sus deseos internos en publicaciones de blogs y redes sociales. Además, Kevin se pone celoso cuando descubre que García puede tener un nuevo interés en el amor.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La UAC se dirige al viejo barrio de Morgan en la ciudad de Chicago en busca de un sujeto cuyo objetivo son los hombres de mediana edad. Y una pista lleva a Morgan a creer que van tras alguien relacionado con el hombre que abusó de él cuando era niño.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando 25 años después se abre una cápsula del tiempo en un pequeño pueblo de Colorado y contiene una revelación espantosa, la UAC investiga ese crimen y un posible vínculo con la muerte de un oficial de policía local.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Consecuencias del pasado
programme.desc: Danny y Baez buscan a una banda de ladrones en una ola de crímenes, y se unen al detective Jimmy Mosley, quien años atrás rompió el corazón de Baez.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Hacia lo inimaginable
programme.desc: El asesino en serie Thomas Wilder desafía a Danny con un mensaje en su última víctima, convirtiendo el juego del gato y el ratón en una venganza personal.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): La milla extra
programme.desc: Erin y Anthony emprenden una búsqueda para encontrar a un testigo clave que huyó por miedo a represalias y convencerlo de testificar.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Boomerang
programme.desc: Estalla la indignación pública cuando no se procesa a un policía que disparó a un adolescente, afectando a Frank, el alcalde y la oficina de Erin. Danny busca al autor de un posterior tiroteo contra un oficial, posible caso de venganza.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El padre de Dinozzo regresa, desempeñando un papel vital en la investigación de un asesinato que podría tener resultados catastróficos.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El equipo es asignado para proteger al padre de Ziva, cuando su asistencia a una conferencia de NCIS conduce a algunas sorpresas inesperadas.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El equipo busca respuestas después de que una sorprendente emboscada revele un nuevo giro en su investigación.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El equipo del NCIS investiga la desaparición de un contramaestre de la Marina que es el único testigo en un juicio por asesinato que se avecina.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando encuentran víctimas en Filadelfia en un estilo similar al de El replicador, el acosador que ha estado siguiendo cada movimiento de BAU, el equipo piensa que esta podría ser la oportunidad que necesitan para tratar de detenerlo.

programme.title: Mentes criminales

programme.title: Redneck Island
programme.desc: A budding romance between two teammates complicates their future in the game. The challenge forces the competitors to put their brains as well as their brawn to the test.

programme.title: Redneck Island
programme.desc: The power continues to shift in the game, raising the stakes to a new high as the teams brawl it out at the challenge. Old romantic flames reignite between Margaret and Josh.

programme.title: Redneck Island
programme.desc: The rival alliances divide the house as a new power-team emerges. The players have a tough time choking down what Steve is serving up at the challenge. Two best friends face off against each other in an emotional Pit.

programme.title: Redneck Island
programme.desc: The teams hang on for dear life as they fight for victory at the challenge. A wild night of fun leads to chaos when the party gets out of hand. A tough Pit decision threatens to tear friendships apart.

programme.title: Redneck Island
programme.desc: With the end and the money in sight, tensions are high and friendships are tested as the competitors' plot to stay in the game. It's a hard day on the lake as the teams struggle to pull off a crucial win.

programme.title: Redneck Island
programme.desc: With the finale just one challenge away, it's down to the wire and one small misstep may cost a team a shot at $100,000. Emotions are high as it all comes down to the last Pit. The final three teams are revealed.

programme.title: Redneck Island
programme.desc: The end has arrived and the strongest have survived. With everything on the line, the final three teams must push themselves harder than ever before as they compete in an epic final race.

programme.title: The Dude Perfect Show
programme.desc: The Dudes are invited by NASCAR to drive the pace car at Texas Motor Speedway. Before the race, they get some tips from drivers Dale Earnhardt Jr. and Chase Elliot.

programme.title: The Dude Perfect Show
programme.desc: As the Dudes prepare to shoot a video with NBA All-Star Chris Paul and NFL quarterback Aaron Rodgers, they discover that neither athlete's team has a mascot.

programme.title: The Dude Perfect Show
programme.desc: In order to complete a complicated synchronized stunt for an upcoming video, Tyler needs Garrett and Cody to get in sync at all costs. Tyler wants to take his new brand of beef jerky to the next level.

programme.title: The Dude Perfect Show
programme.desc: The Dudes square off in a suped-up lawnmower racing competition for an upcoming video. When it becomes too difficult for even the Dudes to tell the Twins apart, they decide to help the twins create new unique personalities.

programme.title: The Dude Perfect Show
programme.desc: The Dudes travel to London to shoot a soccer trick shot video with Premier League's Manchester City Football Club. Coby and Cory track down their family lineage.

programme.title: The Dude Perfect Show
programme.desc: The guys learn that Garrett never had a proper bachelor party, so they surprise him with the ultimate DP party night: exclusive access to the Bass Pro Pyramid in Memphis.

programme.title: The Dude Perfect Show
programme.desc: When the Dudes discover that the twins will be teaching a Man School class, they think the twins need a crash course in being men.

programme.title: The Dude Perfect Show
programme.desc: After re-discovering the original basketball that starred in their first Dude Perfect video, the Dudes decide to give it one more shot at video glory.

programme.title: The Dude Perfect Show
programme.desc: After booking a video shoot where they'll be doing a snow battle, Tyler takes it upon himself to get the rest of Dude Perfect cold weather ready.

programme.title: The Dude Perfect Show
programme.desc: When the Dudes want to take the game of H-O-R-S-E to the next level by playing while on horseback, they discover that Garrett isn't a big fan of horses. Cody prepares for impending fatherhood, with the help of his friends.

programme.title: The Dude Perfect Show
programme.desc: Tired of Tyler always guilting them into staying late at the office to play more games, Cody begins the search for a temporary brother.

programme.title: The Dude Perfect Show
programme.desc: Since Coby is the only member of Dude Perfect who has never won a Battle Video, the guys attempt to help him reverse his curse with a good-luck cleanse.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: As 51 rookies and veterans arrive to chase their dreams, the candidates hope to prove their talent with a standout solo performance and take on the kick line in the Judges' Showcase.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 04/14/2013. Anthony Bourdain explores one of the most fabled and beautiful areas of Asia: Myanmar, the city of Yangon and the remote Bagan temple.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 04/21/2013. Anthony Bourdain visits Koreatown in Los Angeles, where he finds a tight-knit community marked by the 1992 Rodney King riots.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 04/28/2013. Colombia has changed immensely over the past 10 years. Anthony Bourdain explores several regions of the country, from the mountains down to the Caribbean coast.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 05/05/2013. Chefs and restauranteurs Fred Morin and Dave McMillan, of Joe Beef’s, take us across Canada by rail.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 05/12/2013. Anthony Bourdain explores the "Interzone,” where artists like Burroughs, Bowles and the Rolling Stones sought escape from Western moral prohibitions.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 05/19/2013. Anthony Bourdain explores Libyan hip-hop, Italian restaurants and post-war uncertainty, by examining the country through personal stories, food and music.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 06/02/2013. Bourdain and his friend, world-renowned chef Eric Ripert, move from hip, modern Lima back in time into pre-Columbian Peru.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 06/09/2013. Anthony Bourdain visits Congo, the setting of one of his favorite books, Conrad’s “Heart of Darkness.”

programme.title: Declassified
programme.desc: Aired 6/19/2016. At the height of the Cold War, the CIA recruited a Soviet diplomat with the code name TRIGON to gain valuable intelligence from inside the Soviet Union.

programme.title: Declassified
programme.desc: Aired 6/26/2016. A Defense Intelligence Agency interrogator and U.S Special Forces work together to find missing Iraqi dictator Saddam Hussein.

programme.title: Declassified
programme.desc: Aired 7/03/2016. The Joint Special Operations Command needed to stop violent AQI leader Abu Musab al-Zarqawi and put an end to his reign of terror.

programme.title: Declassified
programme.desc: Aired 7/10/2016. The FBI and Defense Intelligence Agency join forces to catch Ana Montes, a senior DIA analyst who was passing sensitive intelligence to Cuba.

programme.title: Declassified
programme.desc: Aired 8/14/2016. Homeland Security Investigations conducts an elaborate undercover sting operation to stop an illegal arms dealer.

programme.title: Declassified
programme.desc: Aired 8/21/2016. After the Taliban refused to release international aid workers being held hostage in Afghanistan, the CIA, Joint Special Operations Command, and a Taliban double agent race against time to rescue them.

programme.title: Declassified
programme.desc: Aired 8/28/2016. In 2004, the FBI and Naval Criminal Investigative Service needed to catch an engineer who had been stealing U.S. Navy secrets for the Chinese government.

programme.title: Declassified
programme.desc: Aired 9/04/2016. When classified footage from a top secret surveillance satellite was lost in the Pacific Ocean during the Cold War, the U.S. military engaged in a race against time to find and recover the footage before it fell into enemy hands.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 04/14/2013. Anthony Bourdain explores one of the most fabled and beautiful areas of Asia: Myanmar, the city of Yangon and the remote Bagan temple.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A desperate suspect flees from the cops after shots are fired, and a father and daughter are caught off-guard when they run into a man wielding a screwdriver.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An open container and crack pipe are discovered inside a teen's vehicle. Officers find a man at a nearby residence lifting weights after trying to evade police. A fight involving two men and a shovel is broken up.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A little rain doesn’t stop a determined quad driver from trying to outrun police. A deputy has doubts about a man’s professed distrust of banks. A man ignores obvious red flags when buying a moped and ends up paying the price.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An arrest is made in a notorious New Jersey drug hotbed. Officers find a suspect hidden under a mattress. A bicycle thief is caught red handed.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers save a suspect's life after arresting him, a man assaults his wife after she uncovers his internet history, and a pregnant woman fears prosecuting her abuser.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers prevent a potential home invasion when they arrest a wanted man, a passenger becomes defensive during a traffic stop, and officers help a teen recover a stolen bike.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police break up a street-racing ring, a driver tries to make light of his drug-possession charge, and a woman with a felony arrest warrant is fixated on her oral hygiene.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers pursue a male suspect in a speeding truck and ultimately force the vehicle off the road, the suspect is taken into custody without injury. Officers respond to a domestic abuse call. Officers are called to a home where a dead body is found.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A chatty motorist becomes agitated when officers start asking questions, a fleeing driver calls his wife in the middle of a pursuit, and deputies catch a man in a lie.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police question the legitimacy of the name a driver gives them. Both husband and wife protect each other in a case of domestic violence. A 12-year friendship is jeopardized when a woman suspects her roommate of stealing.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man loses his friend and finds trouble, officers stop a vehicle they believe was involved in a shooting, and a suspicious vehicle leads to a suspicious story.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Two men acting strangely in a gas station draw the suspicion of an employee. Deputies arrest a man for creating an unsafe environment for his younger brother. Mom calls the cops when her daughter throws water on her.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A loitering suspect flees when approached by police, and a traffic stop leaves a woman concerned for the future of her marriage.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspicious man attempts to flee Police on foot and is later arrested for possession. Officers in New Jersey charge a garage owner with receiving stolen property. Officers arrest a man after witnesses report purse snatching.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A hit and run call results in the intoxicated suspect being coaxed out of his car at gun-point. Officers respond to a stabbing and the victim is rushed to the hospital by paramedics. Officers give a tour of a newly renovated jail in Maricopa County, AZ.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Suspects in a white van throw a bike at police during a wild pursuit. A man runs from Deputies on a mini-bike. A mermaid commits traffic infractions and is caught with pills.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man gets Tased while resisting arrest, police interrupt a transaction going down in a parked vehicle, and a man fired from his job vents his anger at a gas station.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man flees from cops and reaches a dead end. A 40mm impact round is used to gain compliance when he reaches for his pockets. A man claims his anger got the best of him during an armed robbery.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An officer finds a woman asleep at the wheel in the middle of a highway, deputies investigate a possible kidnapping, and a nervous driver just wants to be honest with police.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A woman goes to great lengths to hide her daughter, a couple's glovebox holds a surprise, and an Uber driver gets more than she bargained for.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: The threat of a tasing is enough to slow a fleeing suspect, a heated argument between girlfriends leads to vehicular assault, and a man with weed in his car has no poker face.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: During a routine traffic stop, an Officer recognizes the passengers from a prior drug related arrest. A K-9 unit assists in the pursuit of a grand theft auto suspect who flees on foot.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man's mole gives him away when he tries to fool police with a fake name, a drunken man shows officers he has nothing to hide, and a reckless driver imperils a neighborhood.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A car pursuit turned foot chase ends with the suspect jumping head first into a creek-bed. Officers catch up to a man trying to flee the scene after assaulting his wife. Officers stop a suspicious vehicle driving with no headlights.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A skittish driver’s decision results in a trip to the hospital. A car full of young men swear they were trying to escape an imminent threat. An innocent woman struggles with the decision to press charges on her friend.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers dress a naked man who is causing a disturbance, a barefoot man denies evading police, and an intoxicated woman and her husband tell two different stories.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers tackle a man carrying other people's credit cards, two women deny ownership of drug paraphernalia found in their bags, and police mediate a father-son dispute.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom and Catherine investigate the murder of a despised comic who died onstage, apparently after drinking from a tainted bottle of water.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The trampling death of a trainer by her horse aboard a private jet is investigated by Grissom, Catherine, and Nick. Sara and Warrick look into a Romeo and Juliet scenario in the desert.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom, Sara, and Nick investigate the murder of a woman in the press box of a high school stadium.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A professional bank robbery leads to the death of a detective. While investigating the case, Grissom deals with his hearing loss and another CSI gets a personal revelation.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Two couples meet in a bar and one of the couples is murdered. When a second couple is murdered in a similar fashion the team suspects a pair of serial killers are on the loose.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When the lead suspects in Grissom's serial killer case are murdered, Grissom suspects an inside job.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom and Warrick get the case of an elderly woman found mummified in her closet. Sara and Nick arrive to investigate a breaking and entering to find a raped teen.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: During the latest heatwave in Las Vegas, with triple-digit temperatures, Gil and Catherine investigate a baby locked in a car.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The team is introduced to the Furry side of Vegas when a man is found dead on the side of the road, dressed in a raccoon suit.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A severed head is shipped to Dr. Robbins from Jackpot, Nevada. Grissom goes to Jackpot to find the rest of the body and gets very little cooperation from the locals.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Warrick's appearance at the preliminary hearing on a rape and murder case goes terribly wrong when the only piece of evidence is thrown out on a technicality.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A suspect's infatuation with Catherine results in her taking over a high-profile case.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The sheriff is under political pressure to find who killed an air marshal with a car bomb that the sheriff witnessed.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A teenager is found murdered on a construction site. Grissom, Sara, and Warrick follow the lead of blood on a hammer.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Cuando Catherine y Keppler comienzan a investigar el asesinato de una desconocida adolescente, ambos coinciden en que el asesino, que fue meticuloso a la hora de eliminar pruebas del cadáver y sus alrededores, es probablemente reincidente.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Un caso relacionado con el cadáver calcinado de un hombre cuyos huesos y tejidos habían sido extraídos lleva a Nick y Keppler al inquietante mundo de la venta ilegal de partes de cuerpos humanos.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom regresa de su año sabático como profesor mientras el nuevo miembro del equipo Michael Keppler intenta desesperadamente mantener su oscuro pasado oculto a sus colegas.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Con potencialmente menos de un día para intentar evitar los próximos asesinatos, el equipo de CSI debe sacudirse rápidamente la sorpresa de que el verdadero asesino en miniatura no es el difunto Ernie Edward Dell.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: La ocurrencia de Grissom de que dos jóvenes amantes desaparecidos pueden haber huido a México queda pronto anulada por el descubrimiento de gotas de sangre junto a la plaza de aparcamiento libre del chico en el instituto.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Mientras procesa la casa donde fueron asesinadas varias coristas, Sara se ve atormentada por los ojos aterrorizados y las crípticas palabras moribundas de la sexta víctima que descubre.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Greg se ve obligado a enfrentarse de nuevo a la hostil madre y al hermano del matón al que mató en defensa propia hace varios meses cuando el equipo de CSI descubre que el hermano está implicado en un nuevo caso de asesinato.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Mientras Grissom y el resto de los CSI están fuera investigando nuevos casos, Hodges hace creer a Archie, Henry, Mandy y Wendy que Grissom quiere que se unan en secreto esa noche para intentar resolver los cuatro casos de asesinos en miniatura.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: En su intento por identificar al asesino de un ex boxeador que vivía entre un grupo de prostitutas que lo detestaban, los CSI deben establecer cuál de los varios actos que pusieron en peligro su vida en una noche realmente lo mató.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI investiga el asesinato de una crupier de blackjack cuyo marido, separado de ella, tiene vínculos con un club de creyentes en los ovnis.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A Sara le inquieta que Grissom se reúna con Lady Heather durante la investigación de los CSI sobre su intento de asesinato por parte de un cliente al que se niega a nombrar.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Mientras el equipo de CSI se acerca más que nunca a la identificación del asesino en miniatura, Sara desaparece misteriosamente, lo que obliga a sacar a la luz su relación con Grissom.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El destino de Sara sigue siendo una incógnita mientras el equipo de CSI se apresura a averiguar si ha sobrevivido al ataque del asesino en miniatura, en el estreno de la octava temporada.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI investiga dos casos inusuales. La muerte de un conductor de go-carts cuyo cuerpo decapitado se encuentra a metros de la carretera por la que corría, y el misterioso asesinato en un restaurante donde los clientes cenan en la oscuridad.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When a robbery/homicide leaves two men dead and a third still alive, Horatio is determined to find out what really happened.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Todd Burton is trying to drive out of the hurricane's fury when he kills a man in the blinding storm and is now accused of vehicular manslaughter.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A gas man is engulfed in invisible flames and dies all of which happens during a qualifying race at the Grand Prix Americas.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio finally closes the case of his brother's murder. He is reunited with Suzie, a former drug user who was involved with his brother.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: After a woman is witnessed being attacked by a shark, the CSIs learn that she was murdered prior to being dumped in the water.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A young woman is thrown over the railing of a parking garage, the investigation into her death uncovers evidence that she was killed before the fall.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: After a plastic surgery anesthesiologist is found dead from an apparent suicide, Horatio thinks that this could be a case of murder.

programme.title: CSI: Miami

programme.desc: Después de cumplir su condena, un ex pistolero regresa a su ciudad planeando vivir una vida tranquila, sin embargo, los hijos de un hombre que mató tienen otros planes.

programme.title: La flecha envenenada (LAS)
programme.desc: Una joven huérfana es atacada por apaches y debe pagar las deudas de su padre, ya que puede ser despojada de sus tierras.

programme.title: El Potro Salvaje
programme.desc: Gastón halla en el campo el cadáver de Gerardo, dueño del potro blanco Rayo de Plata, e impide que el animal sea asesinado por El Manco.

programme.title: Tierra baja
programme.desc: Un hombre casado, el más rico del pueblo para proteger a su amante, la obligó a casarse con uno de sus pastores. Un ignorante, pero valiente pastor que se enfrenta a los lobos. Nadie anticipa que el pastor defenderá a su esposa.

programme.title: Tierra Salvaje

programme.title: The Curious Case Of Benjamin Button
programme.desc: Brad Pitt y Cate Blanchett protagonizan esta adaptación de la historia de F. Scott Fitzgerald acerca de un anciano que va rejuveneciendo y los problemas que surgen cuando se enamora de una mujer.

programme.title: Paranoia
programme.desc: Kale Brecht (Shia LaBeouf) pasa los días espiando a los vecinos, mientras cumple un arresto domiciliario de tres meses. Todo es juegos y diversión hasta que las cosas dan un horroroso giro hacia lo peor.

programme.title: A contrarreloj
programme.desc: En este fascinante thriller, el jefe de Policía (Denzel Washington) de una pequeña ciudad, se ve inmerso en graves problemas al investigar el asesinato de una mujer con la que mantenía una relación en secreto porque todas las pruebas apuntan a él.

programme.title: The Curious Case Of Benjamin Button
programme.desc: Brad Pitt y Cate Blanchett protagonizan esta adaptación de la historia de F. Scott Fitzgerald acerca de un anciano que va rejuveneciendo y los problemas que surgen cuando se enamora de una mujer.

programme.title: ¿A quién ama Gilbert Grape?

programme.title: Verano en Louisiana
programme.desc: La historia de una joven que llega a la mayoría de edad y se enamora de su vecino.

programme.title: Corazones en conflicto
programme.desc: Joon es una joven que padece de una afección mental y Benny, su hermano mayor, se ha pasado la vida cuidándola. Sus vidas cambiarán para siempre cuando un inadaptado caprichoso llamado Sam se abre camino en sus corazones.

programme.title: A Walk On The Moon
programme.desc: En el verano de 1969, Pearl (Diane Lane) conoce a un extraño sensual y de espíritu libre (Viggo Mortensen), durante unas tediosas vacaciones familiares más con su esposo. Así que hará lo impensable: tener un intrépido y apasionado amorío.

programme.title: I.Q: fórmula para amar

programme.title: A primera vista
programme.desc: La historia, basada en la vida real, transcurre en Nueva York y comienza cuando una arquitecta se enamora de un carismático masajista ciego.

programme.title: Corazones en conflicto
programme.desc: Joon es una joven que padece de una afección mental y Benny, su hermano mayor, se ha pasado la vida cuidándola. Sus vidas cambiarán para siempre cuando un inadaptado caprichoso llamado Sam se abre camino en sus corazones.

programme.title: A Walk On The Moon
programme.desc: En el verano de 1969, Pearl (Diane Lane) conoce a un extraño sensual y de espíritu libre (Viggo Mortensen), durante unas tediosas vacaciones familiares más con su esposo. Así que hará lo impensable: tener un intrépido y apasionado amorío.

programme.title: Contacto sangriento

programme.title: Juego letal

programme.title: Lara Croft: Tomb Raider
programme.desc: La ganadora del Oscar Angelina Jolie reinventa al héroe de acción moderno en la película Lara Croft: Tomb Raider. Lara Croft nació dentro de la opulencia y fue educada en las escuelas más exclusivas

programme.title: Lara Croft Tomb Raider: la cuna de la vida

programme.title: El Pago
programme.desc: Michael Jennings trabaja en proyectos ultrasecretos. Luego de cada trabajo, borran su memoria.

programme.title: Lara Croft: Tomb Raider
programme.desc: La ganadora del Oscar Angelina Jolie reinventa al héroe de acción moderno en la película Lara Croft: Tomb Raider. Lara Croft nació dentro de la opulencia y fue educada en las escuelas más exclusivas

programme.title: Después de Lucía
programme.desc: Alejandra es una joven de 17 años que se acaba de mudar a la ciudad de México con su padre. Ella se convierte en el blanco de sus compañeros cuando comienza a circular un video de ella teniendo relaciones sexuales.

programme.title: El camino correcto
programme.desc: Arturo, un joven de la ciudad de El Verde Bonao en la República Dominicana rural, aprovecha las posibilidades que se le presentan al ir a la ciudad con la esperanza de ayudar a su madre, que acaba de ser diagnosticada con leucemia.

programme.title: Las motitos
programme.desc: Juliana y Lautaro viven en un humilde barrio asediado por la policía, están enamorados y se enfrentan a un embarazo no deseado.

programme.title: Aquí entre nos
programme.desc: Cansado de que su esposa y sus tres hijas lo tomen por sentado, Rodolfo Guerra se despierta una mañana y decide no ir a trabajar. Luego empieza la locura.

programme.title: Una mujer sin filtro
programme.desc: Paz, una amable mujer, permitió que todos alrededor de ella la trataran como si no fuera nada, manteniendo el silencio para no herir ningún sentimiento. Hasta que un día, un fenómeno fuerza su cabeza a expresar lo que siente.

programme.title: Ya veremos
programme.desc: Los padres de Santi están divorciados, y él está acostumbrado a vivir con ellos pero por separado. Tras una urgente cirugía para salvar su vista, Santi decide hacer una lista de deseos por cumplir pero con sus padres unidos.

programme.title: Compadres
programme.desc: Un policía mexicano y un joven americano hacker de computadores, unen fuerzas para entregar un criminal a la justicia en esta comedia de acción llena de altas emociones y risas escandalosas.

programme.title: Del crepúsculo al amanecer 3: la hija del verdugo
programme.desc: Al caer la noche, el escritor Ambrose Bierce y otros compañeros de viaje se reúnen en un bar en el desierto de México, en 1914. Será una experiencia difícil de olvidar, ya que el bar está dirigido por un grupo de seres sedientos de sangre.

programme.title: El aro 2
programme.desc: Cuando la evidencia en la escena del crimen local revela un misterioso y anónimo video, Rachel se da cuenta que Samara ha vuelto y está más decidida que nunca a continuar su despiadado ciclo del terror.

programme.title: Mientras Duermes
programme.desc: Un portero trastornado que tiene la manía de atormentar a sus residentes decide intimidar a la vecina más alegre y arruinarle la vida a toda costa.

programme.title: Cujo
programme.desc: Mientrtas Donna y Vic Trenton luchan para salvar tambaleante su matrimonio, su hijo Tad se hace amigo del adorable San Bernardo de 90 kilos de su mecánico.

programme.title: La leyenda del jinete sin cabeza
programme.desc: Johnny Depp es Ichabod Crane, un investigador decidido a detener los asesinatos del Jinete Sin Cabeza.

programme.title: Sweeney Todd: The Demon Barber Of Fleet Street
programme.desc: Depp interpreta el personaje que da nombre a la película, un hombre enviado injustamente a prisión que jura venganza, no solo por su castigo, sino también por las devastadoras consecuencias para su esposa e hija.

programme.title: Operación Overlord

programme.title: Norbit

programme.title: La mujer de mis pesadillas
programme.desc: Ben Stiller personifica a Eddie, el soltero empedernido de 40 años que finalmente da el "sí" a la hermosa Lila. Pero durante la luna de miel, la mujer de sus sueños resulta ser una completa pesadilla.

programme.title: El chico de oro
programme.desc: Como “El Elegido”, Murphy está en una alocada misión para salvar al Chico de oro, un joven con místicos poderes quien ha sido abducido por un culto maligno.

programme.title: Último viaje a Las Vegas
programme.desc: Cuatro mejores amigos de toda la vida van a Las Vegas para dejar de portarse como adultos de su edad y revivir sus días de gloria. Al llegar, se dan cuenta de que las décadas transformaron Sin City y pusieron a prueba su amistad de manera impensada.

programme.title: La mujer de mis pesadillas

programme.desc: Allen invites Oscar to be a celebrity contestant on his ABC show, and eager Felix persuades him to accept the offer and to take him along as his partner.

programme.desc: To raise funds for his financially troubled amateur opera club, Felix induces Oscar to arrange for a gambling event.

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: The Cannonball must temporarily cease operations: A bird has established a nest in the train's smokestack. Needless to say, Homer Bedloe tries to turn the situation to his advantage.

programme.desc: Sam Drucker's customers at the general store are deserting him to shop at a new supermarket in nearby Pixley.

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: Surveyors discover that Shady Rest straddles the county border and Uncle Joe plans to play this up as a sure-fire tourist attraction.

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: The hotel needs a new water heater and Uncle Joe wants to pay for it by selling stock in the Shady Rest Hotel Corporation.

programme.title: Petticoat Junction

programme.desc: A top-secret Air Force camera, equipped with a detonating device to prevent its capture, falls out of a plane--and lands at Shady Rest.

programme.desc: Homer Bedloe has arranged for the Pixley Bank to foreclose on Kate Bradley's mortgage, so Uncle Joe and the daughters are forced to seek employment.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: The farmers of Hooterville are headed to France! Or at least they are if they can get organized. As part of an agricultural exchange program, the farmers are offered a chance to join a chartered government flight to Europe.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Love is in the air as the first day of spring arrives in Hooterville. And who better to lead the town in celebrating it than Lisa. She is resolved to show Oliver just what spring is all about and sets out to produce a Spring festival celebration.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: It's a hair-raising episode as Eb (Tom Lester) enrolls in a correspondence course to become a barber. Lisa (Eva Gabor) and Oliver (Eddie Albert) give him the money to learn the trade but learning how to cut hair by mail has its glitches.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: For a lawyer, Oliver should be more careful about what he signs. Lisa reminds him that two years ago Oliver made her a promise to take her back to New York for a two-week vacation. And she has it in writing… on the bottom of the kitchen drawer.

programme.title: Green Acres

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: There's a problem in Hooterville: no farmer seems able to grow a cash crop on account of the quality of the soil. But as it turns out from Oliver's (Eddie Albert) soil and mineral research, the oft-misunderstood rutabaga is an ideal choice.

programme.title: Green Acres

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: Mike's former partner returns to San Francisco, but not because of any longing for the good old days. He is back in town to kill the hired gunman who murdered his son years before.

programme.title: Barnaby Jones
programme.desc: While investigating the whereabouts of millions of embezzled money, Barnaby uncovers fraud, blackmail, and a couple of murders committed by a man who is supposed to be dead.

programme.title: Barnaby Jones
programme.desc: Barnaby is hired to investigate the alleged suicide of a very wealthy woman's husband. What he discovers is another investigator who supplements his income with blackmail, and will murder anyone who gets in his way.

programme.title: Barnaby Jones

programme.title: Barnaby Jones
programme.desc: Three otherwise ordinary guys who carpool together plan a $335,000 heist, but when things go horribly wrong and it turns into a case of murder, Barnaby Jones gets involved.

programme.title: Barnaby Jones
programme.desc: Clete Larkin, who works for an insurance company is beaten and thrown him down an elevator shaft by a disgruntled associate, sociopath Cam Wheeler, just out of prison "on a technicality".

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: Honolulu prostitutes are being murdered, and those who have not been are living in terror. McGarrett feels sure the murderer's game is extortion — a demand accompanied by a death threat which is carried out if the demand is not met.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: Five bodies found in Mauna Loa volcano crater due to radioactive poisoning from plutonium exposure. Steve McGarrett investigates to find source on the Island.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: Steve McGarrett searches for unknown international assassin whose next target may be a VIP. Murder of CIA agent and hotel PR director lead to investigation.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: Forger Hunter Hickey steals $14,000 from Five-O, prepares for $100k forgery on bank & Navy. Steve McGarrett tries to stop him.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: Tragedy strikes the annual Trans-Pac race from California to Hawaii, bringing Steve McGarrett and his Five-O agents onto the sporty yachting scene in search of a trio of mutineer-murderers.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: Wrongly convicted man escapes prison to prove innocence after refusing parole. McGarrett's only clue: claim accepting parole would mean guilt admission.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: MacGyver and Pete Thornton travel to Southeast Asia to rescue a group of orphans, a nun, and Mac's old flame, Debra Easton, whose lives are threatened by an oppressive regime.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: MacGyver and a deaf school teacher, Carrie Linden, live out a nightmare when they stumble upon an ex-CIA agent's ingenious plan to steal a missile, piece by piece, and sell it on the black market.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: MacGyver battles the mob while protecting an elderly couple who have unwittingly become mixed up in a syndicate counterfeiting operation.

programme.title: Sea Hunt
programme.desc: Two divers make an exciting discovery: the wreck of the 'Seawind,' a luxury yacht which sank with a magnificent jewel collection aboard. But Lou Martin spots the divers and drowns them. Investigating the drownings, Mike tracks down Martin.

programme.title: Sea Hunt
programme.desc: While on assignment to examine the possibilities of a canal which would connect two Latin American lakes, Mike is fired upon by rebel guerillas. After further examination, he learns the reason why -- a huge cache of arms and ammunition hidden in a cave.

programme.title: Sea Hunt

programme.title: Sea Hunt
programme.desc: Greek sponge-diver Elias Staros and his girlfriend Cara find a valuable antique statue on the floor of the Mediterranean Sea. Afraid Mike will interfere, they rig the area with booby-trap mines.

programme.title: Sea Hunt

programme.title: Sea Hunt
programme.desc: While searching an underwater cave, geologist George Bryan is trapped in a sudden landslide which pins a massive rock to the cave entrance. Racing against time, Mike tries heroically to pull the rock away which the aid of hooks and cables.

programme.title: Sea Hunt

programme.desc: Kimble flees to a mountain community that knows no law but its own. When Gerard follows and identifies himself as a lawman, he is promptly framed and given a trial before a jury that convicts him. Only Kimble can establish the truth.

programme.title: The Fugitive

programme.desc: En una noche con vientos en Kansas en 1995, un misterioso incendio arrasó con la casa de un doctor prominente. Entre los escombros, los investigadores encontraron evidencia que les dijo cómo comenzó el incendio.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: La escena del crimen estaba inundada de sangre, lo que hablaba del horror del crimen: el asesinato de dos niños pequeños y el apuñalamiento de su madre.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En el 2004, la estudiante de enfermería Tamika Huston desapareció de su hogar en Spartanburg, Carolina del Sur. Una pista llevó a los detectives a su auto y encontraron una llave de una casa desconocida que podría ayudar a resolver el caso.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: La coartada
programme.desc: En 1991, una chica de secundaria desaparece después de asistir a una fiesta. El principal sospechoso no tenía a un pero dos testigos que le daban coartada para la noche en que desapareció.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Crimen limpio
programme.desc: Una empleada de una tintorería fue violada y asesinada en la tienda. La policía recurrió a la ciencia forense en busca de las respuestas que necesitaban.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando se encuentra un auto en una zanja de drenaje con dos cuerpos adentro, una punta de un dedo de un guante de látex encontrada en la escena del crimen apuntaría a los investigadores hacia el asesino.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1991, en Grand Junction, Colorado suceden una serie de bombardeos que matan a dos personas y lastiman a uno más. La policía corre para poder encontrar al culpable antes de que vuelva a atacar.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Emboscada en la escuela dominical
programme.desc: Cuando un hombre es asesinado a tiros en su propio garaje, la policía descubre que una herida sufrida por la afligida viuda puede haber sido autoinfligida.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Los investigadores examinan las cenizas de un incendio que mató a una mujer de 40 años. El fuego parecía haber sido iniciado por un cigarrillo desatendido.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: El fuego envuelve la casa donde Lori Keidel y sus hermanos se quedaron solos mientras su padre iba a la lavandería. Años después de la desaparición de su madre, Lori le dice a la policía que fue testigo de la muerte de su madre.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1999, Patrick McRae fue encontrado muerto en su casa de Des Moines y la escena del crimen estaba inundada de sangre. El análisis mostró que procedían de dos personas, una de las cuales era mujer.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1987, la muerte de Crystal Purcell fue considerada un accidente. Luego en el 2001, Barbara Purcell llamó a la policía para sugerir que su desaparecido esposo había matado a Crystal.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Una mujer muere mientras paseaba a sus perros por el bosque. Como no tenía enemigos y su marido tiene una coartada, la policía asume que fue un accidente de caza.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Los síntomas parecidos a los de la gripe de una madre y sus hijos resultan ser algo más grave: intoxicación por talio. Después de la muerte de la madre, los investigadores centran su atención en encontrar al asesino.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 2007, el trailer de Effie y Michael Ratley en Florida se incendia y Michael heroicamente rescata a su esposa e hijo. Un mes después, su esposa es encontrada golpeada hasta la muerte en una habitación de la casa de sus padres.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En este episodio clásico de Archivos Forenses (Forensic Files), la serie de crímenes reales más extensa de la historia de la televisión, un terrorista en serie apunta a un juez, dos abogados e incluso a una casa de la corte.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Los cuerpos de varias mujeres se encuentran en una colina distante en California. La policía hace un descubrimiento cuando una prostituta se escapa y logra identificar a su agresor y su automóvil.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Después de que aparecen 10 cuerpos en Florida, una víctima – Lisa McVey de 17 años de edad – es secuestrada pero liberada. Ella lleva a la policía al autor del crimen, Bobbie Joe Long.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Testigo presencial
programme.desc: Una adolescente desapareció después de una noche de paseos a caballo. Su cuerpo fue encontrado un mes después, a cinco kilómetros de su casa.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Una joven mujer asiste a los servicios religiosos de la tarde y luego desaparece. Cuando se encuentra su automóvil abandonado, el tanque está vacío y falta una lata de gasolina que tenía en su baúl para emergencias.
