programme.desc: Fish-out-of-water attorneys Amara and Titus Hughes adjust to new personal and professional challenges following their move to Atlanta, namely the ruthless Stephanie Carlisle Lancaster.

programme.title: Ambitions
programme.desc: Amara puts Stephanie on notice; Atlanta's first lady learns a shocking secret from a rival's past; Bella makes a bold play to get what she wants; Rondell meets an intriguing ally in her fight to save her restaurant.

programme.title: Ambitions
programme.desc: Stephanie continues her quest to repay Amara; Rondell falls out of favor with Senior, and Bella develops a new strategy.

programme.title: Ambitions
programme.desc: Stephanie and Evan join forces for their own self-interest while Titus embarks on a mission that could jeopardize his entire career.

programme.title: Ambitions
programme.desc: A newcomer to Atlanta carries out a nefarious plan; Stephanie deals from the bottom of the deck to get what she wants.

programme.title: Survivor's Remorse
programme.desc: Cam plans a magical first date for Allison; Uncle Julius takes a jaunt with the police and learns how the other half lives; M-Chuck uses her therapy to heap guilt upon her mother.

programme.title: Survivor's Remorse
programme.desc: Missy is recruited to tutor Jupiter when his draft status is threatened; Cam and Allison's relationship grows, along with Reggie's business ventures.

programme.title: Survivor's Remorse
programme.desc: Reggie has doubts about representing Jupiter; Allison declines Cam's expensive gifts; a crisis rocks the family.

programme.title: Survivor's Remorse
programme.desc: The tragic loss of a loved one leaves family members with a sudden hole in their lives.

programme.title: Survivor's Remorse
programme.desc: The Calloways and the Vaughns comfort one another as they navigate their way through the most trying ritual of their lives.

programme.title: Survivor's Remorse

programme.title: La viuda de blanco
programme.desc: Alicia, Sebastián y los gemelos llegan a la finca para pasar el día, pero los impulsos juegan en su contra y todo se complica. Justino le da una sorpresa a Perfecta y le hace una promesa.

programme.title: La viuda de blanco
programme.desc: Sebastián no sabe lo peligrosa que puede ser Valeria, Blasina escucha sus amenazas y entiende la gravedad de lo que sucede. Iluminada y Dimas también mueren de celos al ver a Panterita.

programme.title: La viuda de blanco
programme.desc: Perfecta conoce los detalles del secuestro de su hijo Amador, no puede creer lo que le dice Laurentino. Alicia pregunta por Panterita, cuando se comenta quién tiene una relación con ella.

programme.title: La viuda de blanco
programme.desc: A pesar de la distancia que Alicia trata de imponer a Sebastián, él le ofrece explicaciones. Perfecta quiere viajar con los niños para mantener vivo el recuerdo de su padre.

programme.title: La viuda de blanco
programme.desc: Alicia piensa que Sebastián es un mentiroso y que es igual a Amador, ella pasa un mal momento cuando alguien solicita trabajo en el hotel. Perfecta tiene los nervios de punta por sus hijos.

programme.title: La viuda de blanco
programme.desc: A Alicia se le hace tarde en el hotel, tiene que buscar la forma de defenderse al llegar a la casa de Justino. Hayde toma medidas en el bar cuando Dimas disfrazado trata de acercarse.

programme.title: La viuda de blanco
programme.desc: Alicia disfruta con sus hijos del día de visita y Justino tiene una fuerte recaída, los gemelos quieren ayudarlo. Sebastián piensa que todo está perdido, reconoce sus errores.

programme.title: La viuda de blanco
programme.desc: Perfecta desconfía de las citas religiosas de Hayde, empieza a indagar, todos se sorprenden con lo que pasa esa noche en el bar. Alicia encuentra a Justino asustado por lo que cree haber visto.

programme.title: La viuda de blanco
programme.desc: Hayde quiere enfrentar a su madre, aunque sus compañeros de la banda le dicen que debe esperar. Sebastián trata de llegar a tiempo, pero es otra persona la que puede ayudarla.

programme.title: La viuda de blanco
programme.desc: Sebastián le dice a Hayde que Perfecta está muy mal en el hospital y que deben prepararse, Dimas le habla a él con claridad. Alicia se entera de quién es Panterita, no oculta sus sentimientos.

programme.title: La viuda de blanco
programme.desc: Sebastián y Alicia se encuentran, él le hace una pregunta directa. Perfecta le pide a su hijo que haga un juramento, mientras Justino no esconde lo que siente, su protegida no está de acuerdo.

programme.title: La viuda de blanco
programme.desc: Sebastián no sabe a qué atenerse con Alicia cuando lleva a los niños a despedirse de Hayde, ella trata de hacerle entender las consecuencias, pero algo ocurre y puede ser demasiado tarde.

programme.title: La viuda de blanco
programme.desc: La angustia se apodera de Alicia, Sebastián tiene una conversación muy seria con los niños. Cuando llegan a buscarla para pasar el día juntos, sus hijos le dicen cosas que la sorprenden.

programme.title: La viuda de blanco
programme.desc: Sebastián tiene dificultades cuando Perfecta regresa del hospital, Iluminada quiere tomarse atribuciones en la casa. La cita con Alicia está en riesgo, los gemelos quieren ayudar a su tío.

programme.desc: Police investigate a missing college girl and discover her double life: attending school by day and working as a call-girl by night. Her body is found and investigators find her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A woman is reported missing after a fight with her husband. Police suspect a man who reported a fire in his car. Two tiny drops of blood are found in the interior. Finally, a tiny clue inside the suspect's watchband helps solve the case.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1991, Maine resident Pearl Smith goes missing after an argument with her husband, Bill Bruns. When investigators find a blood trail that leads to the couple's basement, police are sure they'll find the victim's body.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1989, 4-year-old April Loveless was found dead in the backyard of her Texas home. Her parents told police that she was attacked and killed by wild dogs. Investigators did not agree.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1995, San Diego police are baffled by a pair of hands found in a dumpster. Through further investigation, they determine that the hands are those of missing person Don Hardin.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1996, a federal agency ruled that Terri Strickland had intentionally set the fire that killed her 17-month-old son, Josh Hinson. Using the then-emerging resources of the internet, Strickland undertook her own investigation.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1988, when a patient dies unexpectedly in the office of California neurologist Richard Boggs, police begin what they think will be a routine investigation. Soon they uncover a bizarre story of corpse stealing, fake identity and sexual perversion.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: One investigator's quick thinking helps him capture a shoe impression made in snow before the evidence melts away. The shoe leads investigators to Peter Benedict and Frank Lanoue, who are convicted of aggravated assault and robbery.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1992, 22-year-old Dawn Bruce is brutally murdered in her Virginia apartment. Investigators notice a blood smear on a pillow case that appears to have been made by one of the killer's fingers.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1981, 6-year-old Cassie Hansen disappeared from her Minnesota church during an evening service. After receiving a tip that an older man was seen carrying a small person, police found Cassie's body in a dumpster.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Professional photographer Charles Rathbun claims model Linda Sobek died during a consensual sexual encounter gone wrong, but Sobek's corpse and digital imaging tell a more sinister story.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1998, a Maryland murder mystery performance turns into a real whodunit when the badly burned body of Stephen Hricko is discovered in his hotel room.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1980, Michigan resident Shannon Mohr died in what her new husband, David Davis, reported to be a horseback riding accident. After her death, Shannon's family reported that Davis seemed far from grief-stricken.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: For 15 months, a serial killer was strangling prostitutes in Florida, then taunting police by leaving the bodies in plain sight. The only clues were a tire impression and some threads.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When police in the Great Plains are called about a dead body, a background check on the victim leads them into a bizarre web of homeless drifters, cattle auctions and bad checks — all fronted by elderly couple Ray and Faye Copeland.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1994, a human skull retrieved from an Ohio pond reveals a ghastly crime. Markings on the skull indicate that the victim had been stabbed multiple times and that the teeth had been removed with needle-nose pliers.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1996, when a fundamentalist group begins robbing banks near Spokane, authorities know immediately that they are dealing with experienced criminals.

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In the search for the killer of two Texas teenagers, a behavioral profile led to suspect Jason Massey. Hard science proved the profile was correct, and Massey was executed by lethal injection on April 3, 2001.

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Susie Mowbray was charged in her husband's death. Her son was so convinced of her innocence that he enrolled in law school, studied all of the evidence and, eventually, discovered the truth of what really happened between his parents.

programme.title: Hot Bench
programme.desc: A self-proclaimed minister accuses a neighbor of attacking her Christian character; their argument escalates into a full- blown catfight.; A man's deal to barter handyman work for a used hot tub falls apart when the tub stops working properly.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Ricardos are hosting an evening with friends. When the last guest to arrive introduces his date—all the men at the party fawn over her. Disgusted by the men's behavior, Lucy and Ethel begin to doubt their own feminine wiles.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy and Ricky's thirteenth anniversary is rapidly approaching. In an outward show of affection, they buy each other gifts—golf clubs for Ricky and fur for Lucy.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Ricardos are being interviewed for a "day-in-the-life" magazine article on happy married couples. The interviewer arrives at 7 AM just in time to encounter Lucy making breakfast in a frilly lace apron, while Ricky walks in wearing a smoking jacket.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Mertzes get a pair of new tenants. Sam and Nancy Johnson are from Texas and reportedly have inside knowledge of a certain oil stock that is about to shoot through the roof. Lucy and Ethel are excited by the prospect, but Fred and Ricky have doubts.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: How long can Ricky Ricardo go, without losing his temper? When Lucy buys a new hat for $49.50, Ricky goes ballistic. To make a point, Lucy bets Ricky the cost of the hat that he'll lose his temper long before her next purchase.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Hurt that no one seems to care for his home movies, Ricky declares that he will never show them another feature of his...not even the TV pilot he's creating. Jealous of his project, Lucy enables the help of the Mertzes and creates her own musical western.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky scoffs at his wife and Ethel when they adamantly participate in the hunt for the "Bonus Buck" that will win them prize money from a newspaper contest. Later, Ricky discovers one of the lucky bucks in his own wallet.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy desperately wants to accompany her husband on his concert tour of Hawaii, but Ricky can't afford to bring her along. Unsatisfied, Lucy decides she'll win a trip for herself and neighbors, The Mertzes, by entering a television game show contest.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: In an attempt to compete with her wealthy friends, Lucy pledges $500 (that she doesn't have) to charity. Luckily, Ethel spots an ad in Billboard magazine willing to pay $500 to anyone willing to perform a stunt to publicize a new movie, Women From Mars.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy wants to be a published author after hearing about another housewife who made a fortune doing it. Ricky and the Mertzes don't like it when they discover Lucy's book plays too close a resemblance to real life including anecdotes from their own lives.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy organizes an orchestra among her girlfriends, but it plays so horribly that she asks her bandleader husband, Ricky, to come to a rehearsal and give them some advice. His direction does little to help.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky becomes interested in a diner that is for sale so the Ricardos and the Mertzes all buy it together. Right away, Ethel and Fred feel they are doing all the work while Lucy and Ricky have all the fun.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy decides to try a new look, despite her husband Ricky's objections. She borrows a black wig from her hairdresser Roberta, who tells Lucy it makes her look like a whole different person. With that in mind, Lucy decides to play a little trick on Ricky.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy's mother writes to ask if she and her husband "Xavier" would be so kind as to entertain "a friend's roommate's cousin's middle boy, Ernest" when he visits New York.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy and Ricky, tired of the extensive visit by their cousin Tennessee Ernie, try to get rid of the likeable character by pleading poverty. Ernie then tries to help his gracious hosts out of their fiscal desperation.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Golf pro, Jimmy Demaret, visits Lucy and Ethel on the green to show them how the game is really played after they're misled by Ricky and Fred. Lucy and Ethel decide they'll learn how to play golf to spend more time with their husbands.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky books a two-month summer job in Maine and decides to take Lucy and Little Ricky. For the summer, they want to sublet their apartment at a profit, but their friends and landlords, the Mertzes, are not in favor.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky Ricardo hires business manager Mr. Hickox to solve the family budget problems. Lucy, dissatisfied with her new $5 per month allowance, manages to find a loophole in the business manager's system.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy agrees to help her neighbor Fred Mertz impress an old vaudeville buddy who's in town for a visit. Lucy poses as the Mertzes maid "Bessie" to make Barney Kurtz believe Fred hit it big in real estate.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy feigns a crisis to test Ricky's love after hearing a story about a woman whose husband ignored her pleas for help while being robbed—she assumes Ricky would turn his back on her too.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy plays Cupid and tries to bag a bachelor for a husband-hungry girlfriend. Lucy organizes an evening to show her unmarried friends, Dorothy and Sam, how wonderful marriage is.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky agrees reluctantly to host a new television show, sponsored by Phipps Department Store, and learns they'd like him to host with his wife Lucy. When Lucy finds out that Ricky didn't want her in the show, she sets out to sabotage the program.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: When Ben Benjamin arrives at the Ricardos' apartment, Lucy mistakes Ben Benjamin, a Hollywood talent scout, for a burglar and nearly ruins Ricky's chance for a film career.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy travels with Ricky to Hollywood for his big screen test and gets excited about the possibility of living there. According to industry insiders, Ricky is a candidate for the lead role in "Don Juan".

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy Ricardo meets her Spanish-speaking mother-in-law for the first time and her efforts to be a gracious host turn disastrous. Lucy's inability to speak Spanish and her in-law's inability to understand Lucy's pantomime erects a wall of misunderstanding.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Despite the reservations of her husband, Lucy decides to help Fred pick out a birthday present for Ethel. She picks out a pair of toreador pants, which Ethel thinks are unflattering as well as too big.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky Ricardo paces the floor, awaiting word from Hollywood about his screen test. Lucy can't use the phone for fear the line will be busy when Ben Benjamin tries to call for Ricky.

programme.title: Evidencias del Crimen
programme.desc: El 19 de marzo de 1998, Akira Ojima, un arquitecto japonés de 57 años, aparece muerto en la nevera de una villa de Nanterre.

programme.title: Evidencias del Crimen
programme.desc: El 21 de marzo de 1991, Pascale Escarfail, de 19 años, es descubierta muerta en su estudio en el distrito 14 de París.

programme.title: Evidencias del Crimen
programme.desc: En un pequeño pueblo de Bougrogne, Éric Desnoue, de 52 años, denuncia la desaparición de su esposa a la policía.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: A principios de los años ochenta, un par de ladrones en serie de bancos ganaron reputación entre las fuerzas de la ley como bandidos formidables.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En el verano de 1999, Texas fue aterrorizada por un asesino en serie que viajaba en tren. El FBI organizó una fuerza de tareas para reunir información sobre el viajero peligroso y crear un perfil que ayudara a localizarlo.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En octubre de 1987, un oficial de policía de Boston que respondió a una llamada por un altercado doméstico fue herido de muerte. Las autoridades hicieron una persecución a lo largo de la ciudad, pero solo pudieron encontrar las huellas del sospechoso.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En agosto de 1984, el hijo de un constructor exitoso de bienes raíces fue secuestrado en frente del negocio de su padre en Miami. Después de que el padre recibió la exigencia de un rescate de tres millones de dólares, el FBI se involucró.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En octubre de 1995, una familia de Carolina del Sur fue tomada de rehén como parte de un robo de banco bien planificado. La policía local rápidamente identificó a dos de los criminales, pero el autor demostró ser más evasivo.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En febrero de 1988, un vendedor de una disquera en Sandusky, Ohio, recibió un disparo mortal en su camioneta. Después de descubrir un bolso con miles de dólares dentro del vehículo, la policía supo que el robo no era el motivo.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En junio de 1973, una niña fue secuestrada de un parque estatal en el río Misuri mientras acampaba con su familia. Pasaron varios meses sin tener pistas, pero luego un agente del FBI tomó un interés particular en el caso.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En 1996, un grupo de políticos extremistas robaron dos veces un banco en Spokane, Washington, con el uso de bombas caseras y la precisión militar para escapar.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En agosto de 1992, un hombre regresó a su casa en Memphis y descubrió que su esposa estaba desaparecida. El esposo, así como sus amigos, sus familiares y vecinos, empezaron a recibir llamadas al azar.

programme.title: La familia del barrio

programme.title: La familia del barrio

programme.title: La familia del barrio

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Don Kecchi, the wealthiest man in America, is terminally ill and has announced that he's donating his entire fortune to charity. However, Lupin steals Kecchi's money and shoots Fujiko right in front of Inspector Zenigata!

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Margaret Tiffany, the owner of Tiffany's and a TV anchor, hires Lupin and his gang to rob her jewelry store on live TV. Initially, Lupin refuses, but ends up having to go through with it thanks to Fujiko's wild spending habits.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: A princess of a small Silk Road country has been kidnapped. Lupin and his gang are persuaded to rescue Princess Yasmin in exchange for a stomach full of holy curry meant for the gods. However, the kidnapping was a trap to lure Lupin.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Here comes Beauty, the assassin hired by ICPO Headquarters to knock off Lupin! Overwhelmed by Beauty's powerful DumDum bullets, Lupin narrowly escapes with his life thanks to Jigen's quick thinking.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin and his gang head to the isolated country of Kimasan, after hearing the country possesses mountains of treasure. They sneak across the border but are quickly captured by Kinkaku and Ginkaku, the giants who rule the country.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Casino Paradise is an artificial island owned and operated by Domino, a casino tycoon. Domino decides to run for President and brags that with $500 million to spend, the only way he can lose is if Lupin steals his campaign funds!

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Political fixer Pomade Jaws trusts no one, not even his wife Laura. He's stored the scandalous secrets of various world leaders inside a voice-activated safe.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin, Jigen and Goemon have turned themselves in to the FBI, but it's all part of the plan. Their real goal is to break out old man Clyde Barlow, who was once known as a genius bank robber, to get his help with their heist of the National Super Bank.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Isamu Kondo III, grandson of the leader of the Shinsengumi, hires Lupin and his gang to recover a golden cannon sunk by the Shogunate forces in the Tsugaru Strait. After much effort, the valuable golden cannon is finally recovered from the deep ocean.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Ellery Queen, the owner of the legendary sapphire called "The Eye of Solomon," is also the owner of a football team. Lupin, coming for the sapphire as announced, discovers Queen on the brink of death.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The 3rd Thieves Olympic is about to be held in Japan, and Lupin and Jigen are in it to win it! After winning the first and second Thieves Olympic, if they also win this year's getaway race, they'll become the first-ever Triple-Crown winners!

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The world's largest diamond has been discovered in South Africa and Lupin has his eyes on the prize. But as it turns out, stealing it is the easy part!

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Fujiko decides to marry Huffner for his jewelry collection, disregarding the rumor that Huffner's brides always die a mysterious death within a few weeks of their wedding. Turns out, he's also a collector of brides and likes them permanently preserved!

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Jigen receives a letter from Sister Angelica and heads to the African country of Borodias. Sister Angelica wants Jigen's help to rescue Dr. Othello, the leader of the country's independence movement.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The ICPO tries a different approach to capturing Lupin: Astrology. It enlists the help of Marianne, a clairvoyant who can read Lupin's actions using astrological predictions and her crystal ball.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Fujiko calls Lupin from Professor Pot's lab, but since Lupin is half-asleep, Jigen takes the call instead. Fujiko claims Professor Pot has accidentally invented a robot that manufactures diamonds, but Jigen doesn't believe a word she says and hangs up.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Fujiko has invited Lupin and company to a classical concert conducted by Kyoransky from the International Philharmonic. After they get a good look at Kyoransky's baton, studded with a a diamond worth at least 200 million yen.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin goes to prison intent on making Silver tell what he did with the loot, only to discover that a new top-of-the-line prison was built over the site where he hid the money. Will the operation to trade an execution for the recovery of the money succeed?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin is after the Golden Bell, symbol of the monarchy of Beltenberg and precious tourist attraction. However, the bell that sparkles in the belfry is just a brass replica.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Zenigata is taken hostage from ICPO headquarters. The terrorists demand to swap him with their boss Napoleon XI, but ICPO refuses. Since Zenigata is no further use to them, the terrorists are bound to kill him; but Lupin is to the rescue?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The Smith Gang hit-man company was once the best in the business, but they're suffering now from tough competition. Though the company chairman Smith considers running TV ads to revive his business, he can't think of a good way to do it.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Though Joe Spade was once a formidable hitman of renown and Jigen's sharpshooter coach, he now comes to beg for Jigen's help; he had gotten old, flubbed a hit contract, and is now on the run.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: ICPO Bureau Chief Jasmine is an able commissioner. She uses the governor to spur Zenigata into action, as she has a secret plan to arrest Lupin. But Jasmine's plan is to make this mission her very last at ICPO so she could get married.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Nightlight Mask murdered the Duke of Le Mond and stole his diamonds. ICPO is having trouble solving the case, so they induct mystery author Conan Dorill as a special inspector. Dorill deduces that the true identity of Nightlight Mask is Lupin.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: On a night of thunder and rain, a man gives Lupin a doll. The next day there is a news report that a diamond called the Phoenix's Tear had been stolen. Lupin's been caught on security cameras, but he has no recollection of having done the deed.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin's target is the Vatican Crown, located at the North Pole. He devises a plan to thwart pesky Fujiko, which is to relocate penguins at the South Pole to the North Pole.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The World Crime Prevention Devices Association has developed the "killer safe" that sent many safe crackers to their graves. But Lupin takes the challenge to steal what it guards.

programme.title: Great Games

programme.title: La venganza de los ex
programme.desc: Ocho solteros llegan a una villa en Tulum dispuestos a conocerse y ligar en unas vacaciones únicas. Hay una fiesta de blanco y luego pasean en cuatrimotos hasta un cenote. Llega el primer ex y una pareja conoce la Master Suite.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex
programme.desc: Llega el segundo ex a la villa y de inmediato causa polémica. En la fiesta dorada, Montse se divierte con Alejandro. Norma y Sargento coquetean en la piscina, mientras que Alejandro se va de cita y trata de ligar con sus famosos masajes.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex
programme.desc: Hay un nuevo ex en la villa, que no le cae muy bien a todos, pero parece que habrá una reconciliación. Norma está celosa por Sargento y Renata. En la fiesta de togas, Montse y Ernesto coquetean. Sargento se altera y casi llega a los golpes.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex
programme.desc: Llega un nuevo ex dispuesto a buscar venganza. La pool party se descontrola y surge el amor entre Renata y Sargento, lo que pone muy celosa a Norma. Montse y Spencer recuerdan los viejos tiempos y Brenda tiene un plan para vengarse.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex
programme.desc: Llega el quinto ex a la villa y es una gran sorpresa para varios. Spencer se va de cita y cree encontrar el amor. Rocío muestra que su venganza va en serio y coquetea con Ernesto y Oscar. Una maldición parece romperse en la Master Suite.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex
programme.desc: Hay un nuevo ex y viene dispuesto a reconquistar a su antigua pareja. Renata y Sargento van en serio, mientras que Rocío y Alejandro resuelven sus problemas por un rato. Ernesto sigue tratando de conquistar a Montse.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex
programme.desc: Llega otro ex y causa una revolución en la villa. Ernesto le pide a Montse que sea sincera con él y lo respete. Dianey y Elías se van de cita y le rompen el corazón a Spencer, quien encuentra consuelo muy rápido en Norma.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex
programme.desc: Llega un nuevo ex y es alguien muy esperado, pero todo lo que ha ocurrido en las vacaciones impide la reconciliación. Spencer está decepcionado de Oscar y Norma tiene cruda moral. Renata ve con cariño a Elías y Sargento se pone celoso.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex
programme.desc: Llega un nuevo ex que causa celos. Renata llora por Sargento, y Rocío discute otra vez con Alejandro y sobrepasa sus límites. Hay una votación sorpresa y una decisión que deja a todos en shock. Ernesto quiere dar el siguiente paso con Montse.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex
programme.desc: Llega a la villa un nuevo ex y viene dispuesto a la reconciliación. Rocío no está interesada en Daniel, Renata y Sargento dejan que el amor fluya, y Montse y Ernesto anuncian su noviazgo. En la fiesta, Brenda completa su venganza.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex
programme.desc: Hay un nuevo ex y quiere recuperar a su antigua pareja, pero la cita cambia los planes. Una pareja termina antes sus vacaciones y Spencer se abre con Norma. Rocío hace una visita exprés a la Master Suite. Hay una ceremonia de compromiso.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex
programme.desc: Entra de sorpresa el último ex y todos quedan en shock. La fiesta de compromiso cierra con broche de oro en la Master Suite. Unos videos le abren los ojos a varios y, en la fiesta final, recuerdan los mejores momentos de las vacaciones.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Guitarist Manuel Barrueco provides an amazing performance. King Friday requests a "looking inside things device" from Corney. The best Corney could come up with is a "look carefully device" magnifying glass.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: What's in Mister Rogers' box? There are words for people who know how to read words, pictures for people who know how to read pictures and a toy truck! Mister Rogers shows a video with different big trucks.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers visits a garage where electric cars are being made, and he takes one out for a drive. In the Neighborhood of Make-Believe, Handyman Negri organizes a search for Prince Tuesday, and the unhappy Prince is finally found.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood

programme.desc: Mister Rogers uses scissors and talks about safety. Lady Elaine tells Officer Clemmons she won't return to the Neighborhood until King Friday changes his rule against play. Lou Schreiber, Johnny Costa, and Joe Negri play music together.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers visits a cave. Lady Elaine won't return until the no-play rule is changed. King Friday removes the ban when he realizes his fanfare cannot be played.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: En este mundo, la verdadera maldad existe. Acecha dentro de las sombras más oscuras, así como en los lugares más sencillos. Se disfraza con muchas máscaras para engañarnos y, finalmente, destruirnos.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: La ciencia moderna nos afirma que, en el nivel más simple, el mundo material no es más que energía y que todos estamos conectados de forma física con el mundo que nos rodea.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: Ron y Nancy están convencidos de que su nuevo hogar es demasiado bueno para ser verdad: la histórica casa Baltimore se adapta de forma ideal a su presupuesto, y además, es tan grande como para alojar a su gran familia.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: Existen algunos lazos que no pueden romperse, tal como el vínculo que se establece entre una madre y su hija... o el vínculo psíquico entre un asesino y su víctima.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: Cuando Clara y su familia se mudan a una pequeña casa en la zona rural de Hinsdale, Nueva York, se dan cuenta de que la paz de la vida en el campo es simplemente una ilusión y que la amenaza de muerte es muy real.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: La casa de rancho de Ed y Beth parece el lugar perfecto para criar a su niño pequeño hasta que descubren que no están solos, y una espesa niebla oscura se cierne sobre la casa y crece día a día.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: En la vida, las personas pueden vivir atormentadas por sus propios crímenes. Lo mismo también puede ocurrir en la muerte: espíritus enojados pueden quedar varados en el mismo lugar donde perdieron su humanidad.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: ¿Qué tan diferente podría ser nuestra realidad si no pudiéramos sentir y comunicarnos de las formas más convencionales? Para Marie, este es un tema que forma parte de su día a día. Su hija Julie padece un problema mental que la debilita.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: Algunas personas creen que los fantasmas son espíritus humanos que deben lidiar con asuntos aún pendientes y que quizás puedan necesitar la ayuda de los vivos con el fin de encontrar la paz entre los muertos.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: Deb y Tony acaban de comenzar su vida juntos. Con su primer hijo en camino, la pareja trabajadora se muda a una pintoresca casa en Atchison, en el estado de Kansas, con muchas esperanzas para el futuro.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: En la isla de Taiwán muchas personas creen que no existen fronteras entre el mundo material y el reino espiritual. Los fantasmas forman parte de la vida cotidiana.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: En la Biblia se relata una historia en la cual Jesús y sus discípulos un día se toparon con un paria que se encontraba poseído. Cuando Jesús le preguntó a ese hombre cómo se llamaba, este le respondió que, dentro de él.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: Se ha dicho que cada fotografía roba una parte del alma de un hombre. Entonces, ¿qué ocurre con todas esas partes cuando la persona ya ha fallecido?

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: Los niños a menudo se encuentran a merced del mundo de los adultos y, algunas veces, se sienten incapaces de influir en el curso de sus propias existencias.

programme.title: Descubrir: Episodio 11: Karnataka
programme.desc: Descubrir transporta al espectador a los destinos más famosos y por las rutas menos transitadas, donde uno puede sentirse un verdadero viajero, disfrutando de paisajes diferentes, conociendo otras gentes y mucho más

programme.title: Descubrir: Episodio 12: Ecuador
programme.desc: Descubrir transporta al espectador a los destinos más famosos y por las rutas menos transitadas, donde uno puede sentirse un verdadero viajero, disfrutando de paisajes diferentes, conociendo otras gentes y mucho más

programme.title: Iconos de vida silvestre
programme.desc: Desde su época de adversarios peligrosos hasta cazadores colonialistas, hasta los desafíos actuales y considerables de la vida cotidiana.

programme.title: Iconos de vida silvestre
programme.desc: Esta historia descubre el fascinante mundo de los escarabajos de estiércol y sus incansables esfuerzos como algunos de los trabajadores más duros de la naturaleza.

programme.title: Las aves salvajes de Australia
programme.desc: Siguiendo la historia de Harry y Sally, un par de pingüinos pequeños. Estas aves voladoras y aleteadas crean algunos de los barrios más ruidosos de la naturaleza.

programme.title: Las aves salvajes de Australia
programme.desc: El emú es la ave nativa más grande de Australia y es la segunda ave más grande del mundo después del avestruz africano: dos metros de altura, con una zancada de casi tres metros.

programme.title: Las aves salvajes de Australia
programme.desc: Australia tiene muchas especies depredadoras, pero algunas de sus más feroces son sus aves rapaces. Estos asesinos altamente especializados son poderosos, ingeniosos y llamativos. Algunos, como halcones, águilas y águilas pescadoras, cazan de día.

programme.title: Las aves salvajes de Australia
programme.desc: La reproducción exitosa es crítica para la supervivencia de cualquier especie de ave. Aquí, nos encontramos con cuatro que hacen todo lo posible para encontrar compañeros y criar a sus crías.

programme.title: Descubriendo el mundo
programme.desc: Descubre el alma de la cultura menorquina. Considerada la más atractiva de las Islas Baleares, Menorca está salpicada de destacados yacimientos prehistóricos, bordeada por escarpados acantilados y bendecida con un encanto irresistible.

programme.title: Descubriendo el mundo
programme.desc: Históricamente, Mallorca ha capturado la fantasía de los artistas de todo el mundo a lo largo de los años, ya que Miró, Picasso, Dalí, Chopin y Sand cayeron bajo el hechizo de la irresistible Mallorca.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Tour de un cocinero
programme.desc: Tony emprende un peregrinaje a Sídney, Australia, para disfrutar de una comida preparada por uno de los mejores chefs del mundo: Tetsuya Wakuda.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Tour de un cocinero
programme.desc: Melbourne, Australia, tiene amantes de la comida fuertes, amables y excéntricos: la clase de gente de Tony. Buscando a los proscritos de la comida.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Tour de un cocinero
programme.desc: Tony se propone buscar el verdadero Singapur, con sus restaurantes multiculturales y mercados de alimentos. Prueba diversos platillos, explora el mercado de Geyland Serai, viaja en el limpio y eficiente metro local.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs reveals that he and Plankton have not always been bitter enemies.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs' old fry cook pays a visit to the Krusty Krab; SpongeBob invests in night lights to ward off the boogeyman.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob sends away for a free toy; SpongeBob comes down with a case of contagious sea fungus.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: El Sr. Krabs promete que un payaso actuará en su patio de juegos; Bob Esponja y Patricio acampan en el patio trasero.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Bob Esponja olvida quien es él cuando pierde su etiqueta de identidad; Plankton celebra los 25 años tratando de robar la receta secreta del restaurant Krabby Patty.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Bob Esponja se da cuenta que quiere volar con las medusas; Patchy descubre un episodio nuevo de Bob Esponja y lo pierde.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Bob Esponja se vuelve un botador de basura para la policía; Bob Esponja y Patricio compran un aerosol invisible para espantar en Fondo de Bikini.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Bob Esponja se entrevista para un trabajo como cocinero en Krusty Krab; jardín de Calamardo; Bob Esponja conoce a Sandy Cheeks.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Bob Esponja hace burbujas; Bob Esponja accidentalmente rompe sus pantalones mientras intenta impresionar a Sandy Cheeks en Playa Mussel.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Bob Esponja y Patricio llevan a Calamardo a pescar; Bob Esponja víctima del plan de Plankton.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Bob Esponja y Patricio se comunican a través de burbujas de jabón, pero la broma no es agradable para Calamardo. Patricio ayuda a Bob Esponja para pasar su examen de manejo.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Bob Esponja y Calamardo se quedan varados en el desierto mientras entregan una pizza; Bob Esponja pierde su casa piña.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Bob Esponja y Patricio escuchan que sus héroes viven en una residencia de ancianos y deciden ir a buscarlos para que sigan defendiendo el bien; Bob Esponja pierde la confianza en sí mismo cuando Lubina le reclama que olvidó poner los pepinillos.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Ahora le toca a Bob Esponja ser el Monitor en la Escuela Náutica; Bob esponja lleva una medusa salvaje a casa pero se multiplica y toman el control.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Arenita envía un cohete al espacio; Don Cangrejo da a Bob Esponja un par de botas chillonas.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Bob Esponja decide tratar de vivir con las medusas; Calamardo intenta vender su casa a pesar de sus vecinos molestos.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Hay un concurso de talentos en el Rusty Krusty en "Culture Shock" y en "F.U.N." Bob Esponja decide tratar de entablar amistad con el malvado Plancton.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Bob Esponja ordena unas armas falsas; Calamardo finge ser un fantasma.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Bob Esponja lleva a la hija de Don Cangrejo al baile escolar. Bob Esponja y Calamardo compiten por ser el empleado del mes.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: En `SB-129', Calamardo accidentalmente se encuentra a sí mismo en el futuro, y para su sorpresa extraña a Bob Esponja, luego en `Karate Choppers', Bob Esponja y Sandy descubren el karate.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: En `Sleepy Time' Bob Esponja visita los sueños de sus amigos y vecinos. Mientras que en `Suds', Bob Esponja llega con una enfermedad que lo transforma en fabricante de burbujas.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Don Cangrejo convence a Bob Esponja y Patricio de unirse a él en una búsqueda del tesoro. Bob Esponja se sube al autobús equivocado.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Bob Esponja deja a todo el mundo enojado con sus bromas del Día de los Inocentes; Bob Esponja tiene el reto de cocinar para el Rey Neptuno y decide participar en un concurso entre cocineros.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Don Cangrejo advierte a SpongeBob que se mantenga alejado de los anzuelos; Bob Esponja convoca a su héroes favoritos para las emergencias.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Patricio y Bob Esponja aprenden a atar sus zapatos; Calamardo está a cargo del Crustáceo Cascarudo.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Todo Fondo de Bikini huye de Bob Esponja y Patricio le dice que es por ser feo, pero en realidad tiene mal aliento; Perlita obtiene un trabajo en el Crustaceo Cascarudo, se encarga de ponerlo a la moda.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Patricio está encantado cuando recibe un premio, pero por desgracia, era para Bob Esponja; luego, Bob Esponja hace un nuevo amigo, una burbuja que le hace compañía, lo que hace que la gente piense que está loco.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Bob Esponja tiene que lidiar con unas peligrosas bombas-tartas piratas; luego, Plankton construye un falso Don Cangrejo para obtener la receta de Krabby Patty.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Bob Esponja inventa hamburguesas con colores; Sandy pone a Bob Esponja y a Patricio a cuidar de su oruga.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Bob Esponja se pregunta si se puede ser grande y todavía besar a su abuela; Calamardo se muda de Fondo de Bikini.

programme.title: Paradise Run
programme.desc: Racing to the number one spot, three teams each test their memory on a tricky slide and then brave the jungle to wake up a sleeping tiki. But one team gets waterlogged while fighting to hold the lead.

programme.title: Paradise Run
programme.desc: Three teams toss giant rings overboard on a wet and wild adventure in Paradise where they must build a giant tiki and Hula their way through a scavenger hunt on a race to victory.

programme.title: Paradise Run
programme.desc: After splish-splashing their way to the pool and tossing tubes to each other, three teams try to solve a very tricky tiki puzzle before running to the beach to put on some extra special Hula outfits.

programme.title: Paradise Run
programme.desc: Three pairs of teammates scramble to match a funny set of Hula outfits. Then, they rush to the pool to toss tubes onto slippery islands before using their smarts to solve a very special puzzle.

programme.title: Paradise Run
programme.desc: Three teams scramble to find and match phrases on the floating bottles in the lagoon, then some get stumped by giant animal statues around the pool in a wild zodiac-themed challenge.

programme.title: Paradise Run
programme.desc: Three teams rush to deliver everything but the kitchen sink, to hotel guests for a tip. Then, they race to the beach to start matching floating word pairs before a mad dash to the finish line.

programme.title: Paradise Run
programme.desc: After digging for Sand Dollars on the beach, three teams of siblings and besties hop their way across super slippery islands to toss some coconuts before scrambling to set up a very important cabana.

programme.title: Paradise Run
programme.desc: Teams sprint to the pool to toss leis at each other and try not to wipe out on the slippery islands before going on a free-for-all scavenger hunt to build a very important cabana.

programme.title: Paradise Run
programme.desc: Digging up enough sand dollars is no easy task as three teams paddle across the lagoon, then try to set up a crazy cabana before tossing coconuts AND leis in a very slippery challenge.

programme.title: Paradise Run
programme.desc: Three girl duos have to pedal hard to gather beach balls but the resort's waterfall almost sinks their boats. Then, before they can reach the finish line, more than one team gets stuck on the riddle.

programme.title: Paradise Run
programme.desc: An aquatic adventure awaits the teams as they duel with waterfalls for beach balls, then paddle through the waters for a gnarly spelling bee before they check out of their hotel rooms in time.

programme.title: Paradise Run
programme.desc: Teams scramble to check out of their hotel rooms, then get into their boats to do battle with a waterfall before using their spelling and swimming skills to make an island connection.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Justin is convinced that girlfriend Lainie has been cheating on him, and more importantly that he’s not the father of their child. But his own insecurities have led him to turn violent. Also, Steven doubts whether Ashley’s child is his.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Korey says his girlfriend Dominique is a cheater and his suspicions about her job has caused major problems in their relationship. Then, Gregory thinks that his girlfriend Robin is unfaithful!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: These DNA Results Will Floor You
programme.desc: Joe met “Jessica” on a phone chat line. A few months later, she revealed she was pregnant. Then, Chastity claims that her ex Trent fathered her child. What will the DNA results reveal?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Rhoderick wants a DNA test to prove to Melissa that he is not the father of Melanie's baby, but Melanie says that they had sex around the time she conceived. Then, Jessica wants to prove to Vincent that he fathered their child while he was in prison!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Bizarre sexual fetishes come out! Brad’s girlfriend wants him to dress like a little girl. Melissa wants her boyfriend Steve to stop his sexual fetish of flashing.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Preston is ready to ditch Jessica for cheating, but he’s the actual cheater! Then, can KB justify falling for Krystal’s god-sister even with a very open relationship?

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Jamie is here to tell his ex-lover that he actually left her for a guy! Next Amy says her ex-boyfriend is a chronic cheater and she wants nothing to do with him. Then Jasmine is here to teII her boyfriend that she's really a man!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Sheene’s got a secret to reveal to Derrick that may threaten their relationship. Tabitha thinks her man TJ might be cheating again. Plus, Xeo and James are going head to head for the same woman.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Nikki reveals her secret brotherly affairs, but will Joe ever be able to forgive her? Then, “Six O’Clock” confesses that she’s been sleeping with her friend Carisa’s man for money!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Kenny reveals to Kamiko that he cheated on her with his best friend's woman. Scott says he's losing his one true love, Cassye. Plus, Jason is here to win back his ex DJ, But DJ's new love Jake isn't about to give him up without a fight.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Daphne is sleeping with her daughter's boyfriend, G-Quan! He vows that he loves Wendy. But G-Quan has one final confession. Next Jenna says her husband's constant nagging drove her into the arms of her best friend.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Heaven and her two daughters have been prostitutes for April's boyfriend, Dino. Today, angry family members and even Dino's ex try to talk these women away from him!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: For the past 5 years, Trisha has been having a secret affair with her mother's boyfriend, Don! Next Daniel made a decision that he regrets because he's about to lose his fiancee forever.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Whilst in jail, Scooter asked his dad, Richard, if his wife Keri and their child could move in with him, but he didn't expect Keri and Richard to fall in love!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Black wants to leave his fiance Justine to be with a woman named Star. But he's about to find out that Star is actually a man. Then, Jay has to reveal to Brittany the shocking secret that he slept with her sister Donna.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Tempers flare when Belinda's husband finds out she's cheating, but he thinks it's his fault and asks for forgiveness. Next Twist will reveal a huge secret to his fiancee ... he is really a woman!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Fred deceived his lover Jay, so now Jay wants his just desserts! Next Terry's obsession over his stuffed panda is about to drive his girlfriend away! Then Benny will tell his buddy that he secretly wears women's underwear.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Monique quiere probar que Chris la atacó cuando la llevó a casa después de una fiesta. Chris niega haber hecho algo malo y dice que Monique estaba demasiado borracha como para ser consciente de lo que pasó.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Devon entró en coma y está conectado a un sistema de soporte vital. Antes de caer en coma, le dijo a su madre que su ex, Alisha, le dijo que no era el padre de su hijo. Alisha niega haber dicho esto y siente que toda su familia le ha dado la espalda.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Bambi nos da una rara y honesta perspectiva de su ultra exclusivo estilo de vida en Los Ángeles. Tiffany se enfrenta a C.T. por un feo negocio.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: No hay peor momento para pelearse con la familia que durante las vacaciones. ¡Nuestros viejos amigos Donna y su marido infiel Richard nos acompañan en festividades!

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Jerry tiene 58 años y ha pasado por tres cambios importantes. Actualmente está felizmente comprometido con una mujer que se llama Joy y habla de su pasada confusión en cuanto al género.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: ¡Amigos y familiares se niegan a aceptar el matrimonio entre personas del mismo sexo! Martín no quiere que su hijo se case con su novio. Abril quiere recuperar a su ex, ¡pero está enamorado de un hombre! ¿Quién tiene la última palabra?

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Chrishon niega estar comprometido con Taiwana a tres semanas de su boda. ¡Lauren se enfrenta a su ex por dejarla por otra mujer mientras está embarazada! Dave todavía quiere que Leesa lo ame.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Chloe y Dan se casarán pronto, pero finalmente está lista para contarle a él en qué trabaja de verdad. Entonces la madre de Amanda le ruega que renuncie a su trabajo.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Torrance admite haber sido infiel a su novia con un giro sorprendente. Entonces, Heather quiere que Tramisha, el ex de su novio, deje de interferir en su relación.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Harta del maltrato en su relación, Carla le dice a su novio que es infiel con su compañero de cuarto. Luego, Jay quiere decirle a Nikki que ella se acostó con su amante Crystal.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Shianne confiesa que fue infiel a Mistress Delicious con su mamá Blonde. Después, la madre del bebé de Chris se enfrenta a él por dejarla por su compañera de trío.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: ¡Es la batalla de los ex! Tony lucha para recuperar a su ex-amante. Richard le cuenta a su esposa que ha tenido un romance y ve a Lisa, su ex-amante, luchar por recuperarlo.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: En el Show de Jerry Springer de hoy, una batalla de novias. Nicole le da un ultimátum a su amante: o la dejas o me pierdes. ¡Jerry ve cómo saltan chispas en el programa de hoy!

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Je'nier tiene un secreto difícil de contar a Preston. Después, ¡son Nikki y Nikky las que persiguen al mismo hombre! ¿Ganará Nikki o Nikky el corazón de Kevin? ¿Kevin merece el amor de alguna de las dos mujeres?

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: La avioneta dañada pasa por encima de Rosaura. Mairita llorando le pregunta a Anselmo si Rosaura va a regresar. Anselmo le dice que a lo mejor no. Rosaura ve la avioneta y comienza a gritar.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Panchita esconde la ropa de Luis Mario para verlo desnudo. Rosaura llega a darle la comida a Luis Mario y está totalmente desnudo. No sabe que Rosaura está con el.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Luis Mario le dice a Eduarda que se va a casar pero no con Eva. Ella trata de averiguar quién es la mujer pero él no se lo dice. El doctor va a ver a doña Cruz y les dice que la dejen dormir.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: La policía va siguiendo a Karina. Rosaura le dice que se detenga pero ella no quiere y se estrellan. Luis Mario le dice a Eva que se va a casar para llevarle la contraria a Eduarda.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Luis Mario le pide a Rosaura que se case con él y ella acepta. María Julia le da los últimos detalles a Karina para presentarla ante doña Cruz. Caridad recrimina a Eduarda.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Eduarda y Eva se ponen de acuerdo para hacerle la vida imposible a Rosaura una vez que llegue a la casa. Panchita se les une. Luis Mario sigue pensando en Camelia.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Camelia llama a Luis Mario para oír su voz. Su plan es que cuando se canse de Patricio, volverá con Luis Mario porque sigue siendo su esposo. Luisana está llorando desesperada.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Claudia les dice que ahora menos que nunca cree en Karina, por no querer hacerse la prueba de ir con el chisme de doña Cruz. Samuel está con Claudia y tampoco cree en Karina y María Julia.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Eduarda llama a Eva para comentarle un nuevo plan contra Rosaura y con la ayuda de Valeria. Valeria acepta provocar a Luis Mario y besarlo para provocar a Rosaura el día de la fiesta.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Rosaura le suplica a Luis Mario que no la deje. Pero el está decidido a divorciarse. Gabriel le dice a Panchita que le diga señora a Rosaura y manda a Jimena a calmar los ánimos de Luis Mario.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Rosaura está llorando y llama a Luis Mario. Luis Mario regresa con Rosaura, pero como no está piensa que se fue para la casa de su papá. Eduarda le cuenta a Luisana lo que hizo con Rosaura.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Luis Mario y Camelia se van de viaje en el yate pero se presenta en el muelle, Patricio. Camelia lo ve y se queda con la excusa de que dejó la cartera en el carro.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: La avioneta dañada pasa por encima de Rosaura. Mairita llorando le pregunta a Anselmo si Rosaura va a regresar. Anselmo le dice que a lo mejor no. Rosaura ve la avioneta y comienza a gritar.

programme.desc: One man moves his family to a trailer where they share their space with more than 200 snakes. Another man continues to milk deadly snakes on a daily basis, despite developing a life-threatening allergy to venom.

programme.title: Fatal Attractions

programme.title: Alone

programme.title: Alone
programme.desc: On Vancouver Island, a seriously injured participant weighs the risks of seeking medical help and sacrificing his shot at $500,000.

programme.title: Forged in Fire

programme.title: Forged in Fire
programme.desc: Four bladesmiths are tasked with creating a signature Damascus blade out of three different steels of different thicknesses. Only two smiths make it to the final round where they must recreate the Steel Crossbow.

programme.title: Forged in Fire
programme.desc: Four bladesmiths are floored when they must craft a signature blade from a massive piece of elevator cable. It's dirty work forging the oily cable into a blade as the smiths battle delaminations and inclusions.

programme.title: Forged in Fire

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: Greeted by Miss J and a high school marching band, the girls were divided into teams and taught a runway walking routine based on timing and precision.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model

programme.title: Without A Trace
programme.desc: Jack and the team investigate the disappearance of Chelsea Prince (SOFIA SOKOLOV), a 23-year-old society girl known for her constant partying and headline-grabbing escapades.

programme.title: Without A Trace
programme.desc: Martin is wracked with guilt when he fails to prevent Mike (MASAM HOLDEN), a 12-year-old boy, from being dragged into a car outside of the boy's school.

programme.title: Without A Trace
programme.desc: Jack and the team search for a real estate agent who went on an appointment and never returned. The team soon learns that their missing person is actually an undercover cop.

programme.title: Without A Trace
programme.desc: Jack and the team investigate the disappearance of Stephanie, a singer in a church choir, who failed to show up to sing a hymn she requested to perform.

programme.title: Without A Trace
programme.desc: While Vivian takes time off from work to deal with her health problems, her deeply concerned team members attempt to focus on their case of a missing psychic, Agnes.

programme.title: Without A Trace
programme.desc: Thirteen-year-old Daisy Thorpe goes missing in a small upstate New York town that remains shaken by the unsolved murder of the cleric's 13-year-old daughter, Amber, seven years ago.

programme.title: Without A Trace
programme.desc: The team helps Danny search for his missing, estranged brother, Rafael "Rafi" Alvarez (ALEX FERNANDEZ), a recovering drug addict and ex-convict who may have lapsed into past habits.

programme.title: Without A Trace
programme.desc: A 71-year-old man goes missing. The team searches for the man who was last seen getting into a car with two guys. MARTIN LANDAU reprises his role of Frank Malone, Jack's father.

programme.title: Without A Trace
programme.desc: As Vivian undergoes open-heart surgery, Jack and the team search for a missing woman who may be the innocent victim of an identity theft ring.

programme.title: Without A Trace
programme.desc: Martin and Danny attempt to dodge a hail of bullets as a mercenary and his cronies try to kill their true target, an FBI detainee whom the agents are transporting.

programme.title: The Agency
programme.desc: Covert CIA agent Martian is called back to London Station. An incident in Belarus puts Bosko and Henry on a collision course with Langley. Danny learns a lesson. Someone unexpectedly reappears in Martian's life. Series premiere.

programme.title: The Agency
programme.desc: Dr. Blake arrives from Langley and is put to a test by Martian and Henry. A spooked source threatens to put an operation at risk. Danny's cover is put in play. Martian, overtaken by events, begins to question Sami's motives.

programme.title: The Bridge
programme.desc: Sonya and Marco sift through the fallout.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: When the director of a Brooklyn migrant center is abducted and held hostage along with his wife, the team must work quickly to meet the demands of their kidnapper. Also, Maggie picks Jessica's brain about motherhood.

programme.title: LUV
programme.desc: An 11-year-old boy gets a crash course in what it means to be a man when he spends a day with the ex-convict uncle he idolizes.

programme.title: Close Range
programme.desc: A rogue soldier turned outlaw is thrust into a relentless fight with a corrupt sheriff, his obedient deputies, and a dangerous drug cartel in order to protect his family.

programme.title: Frank Miller's Sin City
programme.desc: In these intertwined tales, a universe of unlikely and reluctant heroes try to do the right thing in a city that refuses to care.

programme.desc: Denzel Washington stars in this spell-binding thriller as the Chief of Police of a small town who finds himself caught in the eye of a storm as he investigates the murder of a woman he was secretly seeing….because all the evidence points to him!

programme.title: Blood Ties
programme.desc: Clive Owen & Billy Crudup star in a gritty crime thriller about two brothers on opposite sides of the law. Loyalties are tested when they face off over organized crime in 1974 Brooklyn.

programme.title: The Getaway
programme.desc: An ex-con and his devoted wife must flee from danger when a heist doesn't go as planned.

programme.title: Heist
programme.desc: A jewel thief's nephew is sent along on a heist to ensure a longtime partner in crime stays honest about the division of the loot.

programme.title: The Adventures of Priscilla, Queen of the Desert
programme.desc: For three showgirls it was the dream of a lifetime, a four week cabaret engagement in Alice Springs. The problem is simply getting there intact, along with their bus Priscilla. It's not easy being a drag queen in the outback!

programme.title: Kalifornia
programme.desc: A graduate student and his girlfriend set out on a cross-country road trip to research a book they are writing on serial killers. Along the way, they pick up an ex-con and his girlfriend who will take them on a ride they'll never forget.

programme.title: Hard Eight
programme.desc: John, a half-bright loser stranded in Reno, is down to his last few bucks when Sydney, taking pity on him, buys him breakfast and offers him a few tips on making money in the casinos. Two years later, John has become Sydney's partner.

programme.title: Pulp Fiction
programme.desc: Writer-director Quentin Tarantino delivers an iconic cast of characters in PULP FICTION, a wildly entertaining tale of violence and redemption. John Travolta, Samuel L. Jackson, Uma Thurman, and Bruce Willis star in this pop culture phenomenon.

programme.title: Party Girl
programme.desc: In this raucous comedy, Parker Posey ("Scream 3") stars as a hard-partying NY club girl who takes a job as a librarian.

programme.title: Requiem for a Dream
programme.desc: Darren Aronofsky directs Oscar winners Jared Leto, Jennifer Connelly, and Ellen Burstyn in this hypnotic tale about addiction.

programme.title: Fatal Attraction
programme.desc: Michael Douglas plays Dan, a New York attorney who has a tryst with seductive Alex Forrest while his wife is away. Dan later shrugs off the affair as a mistake and considers it over. But Alex won't be ignored. Not now, not tomorrow, not ever.

programme.title: Freeheld
programme.desc: Julianne Moore and Elliot Page star in this stirring real-life inspirational story of a detective and her domestic partner who battled the legal system for equal rights.

programme.title: Control
programme.desc: Wanting to emulate his musical heroes, Ian Curtis joins a band, Joy Division. The singer's professional, personal, and romantic troubles slowly begin to eat away at him; leading him to commit suicide at the age of 23.

programme.title: The Legend of Bagger Vance
programme.desc: A disillusioned war veteran, Rannulph Junah, agrees to play a game of golf. He finds the game futile until his caddy, Bagger Vance, teaches him the secret of the authentic golf stroke.

programme.title: The Curious Case of Benjamin Button
programme.desc: Brad Pitt and Cate Blanchett star in the adaption of F. Scott Fitzgerald's story about an elderly man who ages backward and the problems that arise when he falls in love with a woman.

programme.desc: Italian chef and food guru Vanessa Gianfrancesco teaches us how to make fresh pasta like an Italian, and then uses that pasta to create everything from fettuccine alfredo to tortelloni to lasagna bianca.

programme.desc: Vanessa Gianfrancesco, Italian chef extraordinaire, shows us how to prepare bread in delicious ways before cooking the perfect juicy steak, with a side of Tuscan beans, and finishing it all with a light tiramisu.

programme.title: One World Kitchen
programme.desc: It's all about comfort food as Japanese-German chef and cookbook author Hana Etsuko Dethlefsen fixes up chicken hotpot, chicken skewers, meat and potato, and a sweet custard.

programme.title: One World Kitchen
programme.desc: Chef and cookbook author Hana Etsuko Dethlefsen makes Japanese Yoshoku dishes – recipes that are inspired by western cuisine, from spaghetti to croquettes to hamburgers and a creamy seafood bake.

programme.title: One World Kitchen

programme.title: The Neighborhood

programme.title: The Neighborhood

programme.title: The Neighborhood
programme.desc: When Gemma's phone is stolen, Dave and Calvin team up to get it back, only to have their mission take an unexpected turn. Also, Malcolm and Marty move into their new house.

programme.title: Cops

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un sospechoso rebelde y sus perros igualmente impredecibles causan problemas. Dos sospechosos de robo son detenidos en la escena del crimen. Un adicto a la metanfetamina está al borde de recaer.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un hombre huye de los oficiales cuando encuentran entrada para los traficantes. Los policías sorprenden a un peatón y ven unos artículos extraños en su chaqueta. Una mujer asume la culpa de su amante.

programme.title: Cops

programme.title: Cops

programme.title: Cops

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Se produce una pelea cuando un auto se voltea en una persecución. Un hombre se queja de que un extraño trató de atarlo con un collar de metal. Una noche de póquer se convierte en un problema.

programme.title: Cops

programme.title: Cops

programme.title: Raising Expectations
programme.desc: Wayne, Paige and Adam are fed up with chauffeuring Bentley. They insist he get his learner’s permit even though he is scared of driving. Emmett attempts to help.

programme.title: Raising Expectations
programme.desc: When Adam injures himself while sneaking in from a party late at night, Emmett covers for him and has to endure the consequences. Wayne is worried about Adam’s football career and Bentley is jealous of all the attention he’s getting.

programme.title: Raising Expectations
programme.desc: Derek’s mysterious behavior leads his brothers to surmise he has a girlfriend and are shocked to discover he’s actually in a choir. Much to Derek’s chagrin, Bentley, Paige and Emmett home in on their choir life.

programme.title: Raising Expectations
programme.desc: Emmett convinces his siblings to create a haunted house. Adam and Emmett procure a very realistic fake cadaver from the teaching hospital, but it turns out the fake cadaver isn’t so fake…

programme.desc: The basement hockey tournament is cut short when Wayne enlists the kids to help him finish Paige's anniversary gift, an outdoor she-­shed.

programme.title: Raising Expectations

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures
programme.desc: Pac-Man is physically controlled by Betrayus when he swallows a special micro-chip, and Pac's friends must help him infiltrate the Netherworld spy-style to retrieve the remote controller.

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures
programme.desc: Lord Betrayus steals the Repository of the ghosts' corporeal bodies, but not before Inky, Blinky, Pinky and Clyde nab one body to share between them. Then it's up to Pac, Cyli and Spiral to get the Repository back from the Netherworld...

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures
programme.desc: Sir Cumference tries to show that he is more than just an old scientist, he's still got it as a freedom fighter – but after some disastrous attempts, it soon becomes clear that he isn't quite the fighter he used to be.

programme.desc: PacWorld is becoming dangerously hot and its citizens mistakenly blame Sir C! Pac and Friends remain loyal to the elderly inventor and, together; they uncover a plot by Betrayus to terra-form PacWorld into a world just like the Netherworld.

programme.desc: The annual Pacolympics approach and allow for Aunt Spheria to reignite a Pac-Pong rivalry with her former Pac-Pong rival and wanna-be suitor - Lord Betrayus. Let the games begin!

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures

programme.desc: Kayla is skeptical when she gets a surprise phone call from Stephan's mom Annette asking to meet up. A call from Amour's dad in prison triggers Kiaya to consider finally making amends with his mom, Carla.

programme.desc: Teen Mom Jenelle's partying forces her mom to take away custody and Leah tries to work things out with the father of her twins. Chelsea tries to get on track to graduate, while Kailyn is heartbroken after her breakup with Jo.

programme.desc: Leah breaks down when the health of one of her twins is in question, while Chelsea starts hanging out with her ex-boyfriend. Kailyn starts dating a new guy, much to the dismay of her ex Jo and Jenelle tries to move back home.

programme.desc: Kailyn is forced to borrow money from Jo to pay for school and Chelsea lets Adam move in so Aubree can have a normal family. Jenelle meets a new guy and spends the night with him, while Leah and Corey decide to move in together.
