programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Dínora amenaza a Gabriela con lastimar a Martín si la delata de nuevo con la policía. Armando y Rosario visitan a Fernando y se enteran de que Dínora se esconde en la hacienda Elizondo.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Rosario le reclama a Dínora por obligar a Gabriela a echar a Sara, y le aconseja a Martín que huya de la hacienda. Fernando lo traslada al primer piso para que no descubra a su amante.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Martín le promete a su hija que no la abandonará jamás, Pepa inspecciona la nueva habitación de su amigo y amenaza a Fernando con denunciarlo por abuso. Los Reyes le dan la bienvenida a Sara.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Los padres de Dínora le preguntan a Fernando por su hija y él niega saber su paradero, Martín escucha detrás de la puerta y empieza a atar cabos. Gabriela también se cambia de habitación.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Mientras Juan intuye que algo malo sucede en la hacienda Elizondo, Gabriela le confiesa a Rosario que su padre corre peligro. En un descuido, Martín observa a Fernando y Dínora cuando se besan.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Martín descubre a los amantes y empieza a gritar, desesperado Fernando le tapa la boca hasta desmayarlo, lo da por muerto y monta el cuerpo en el carro para deshacerse de él, Martín reacciona.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Martín despierta en un sanatorio, los empleados de los Reyes reportan normalidad en la hacienda Elizondo; sin embargo, las hermanas deciden comprobar por sus propios medios lo que sucede.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: El administrador del sanatorio descubre quién es Martín y lo manipula para que no diga nada, Hortencia se interesa en él. Sarita, Ruth y Antonio vigilan el rancho Elizondo por las noches.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Gabriela llega al cuarto de su papá y encuentra a Malcolm vestido como él, Dínora le asegura que si firma el poder para que Fernando pueda vender la hacienda, la llevan a ver a Martín.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Sara le cuenta a su madre delante de Martín lo que vio y juntas van tras Fernando hasta una casa, donde reconocen en la oscuridad a su amante, Gabriela pide un arma y discute con su hija.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Gabriela echa a Fernando de la hacienda, pero Dínora irrumpe en su habitación por la noche y amenaza con matar a Sara si no la obliga a marcharse de la hacienda, Malcolm y Carmela se ríen.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Delante de Fernando, Gabriela echa a Sara de la hacienda y le dice que ha decidido quedarse sola con su esposo. Norma tiene un mal presentimiento mientras Dínora vigila día y noche a su presa.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Dínora amenaza a Gabriela con lastimar a Martín si la delata de nuevo con la policía. Armando y Rosario visitan a Fernando y se enteran de que Dínora se esconde en la hacienda Elizondo.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Rosario le reclama a Dínora por obligar a Gabriela a echar a Sara, y le aconseja a Martín que huya de la hacienda. Fernando lo traslada al primer piso para que no descubra a su amante.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Romance seems close for Thing, the Addams right-hand-in-a-box, when Gomez's aunt arrives for a visit accompanied by Lady Fingers, her handmaiden. Thing enjoys the visit most because it gives him a chance to hold hands with one of his own kind.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez visit Mayor Henson to complain that their property tax is ridiculously low. After the Mayor proves his incompetence by offering a refund, Gomez is persuaded to become a candidate for the office.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: During a welcome home party for Cousin Itt, Morticia notices that the diminutive guest of honor seems to be losing his hair. Uncle Fester experiments with his chemistry set to produce a concoction that grows hair and tries the remedy on Itt.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Wednesday and Pugsley return in tears from trick-or-treating because a neighbor has told them there is no such thing as a witch. Morticia and Gomez plan to prove to the children that they do exist--by summoning a witch to a séance.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Determined to correct the dreadful literature that Wednesday and Pugsley are exposed to, Morticia sets out to create a new literary world. Gomez fears that his wife's first manuscript is so good, that once the publisher reads it he will lose her.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: In need of artistic fulfillment, Morticia takes up sculpting. An art critic views her first endeavor--a three-eyed Gomez statue--and clubs it with his cane. Gomez, who won't have Morticia's heart broken gets a seedy art dealer to buy it.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Pugsley copies one of his dad's old love letters and sends it to his teacher. Miss Dunbar comes to visit the Addams home and confesses to Gomez that no man has ever fallen so in love with her, leading Morticia to pretend to be the jealous wife.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: After Wednesday befriends a new boy her age, Robespierre Courtney, Morticia invites his parents, Mr. and Mrs. Henry Courtney to visit the Addams house for tea. Unbeknownst to them, the Courtney's are hoping to meet a number of the social set.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: There is a neighborhood burglar on the loose, and Morticia has reason to believe it could be Gomez. Morticia decides to probe his subconscious mind for a key to his criminality after she and Uncle Fester discover loot hidden in the storeroom.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's pet plant Cleopatra gobbles up her favorite photo of Gomez from the family album. When the original photographer is found and asked to make a duplicate picture, it is discovered that he is now with the Department of Motor Vehicles.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez plays host to Don Xavier Molines, a family friend during his childhood in Spain, and his daughter Consuella. Morticia's hospitality is put to the test when Consuella reveals that she has been promised in marriage to Gomez since childhood.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Wednesday's and Pugsley's faith in Santa Claus is shaken, Uncle Fester is chosen to back up Santa in case the real St. Nick is too busy to come. However, Fester-Santa gets stuck in the chimney, so each of the other adults fills in for him.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Fester is so smitten upon receipt of a photo of his love, a bearded carnival lady, that he borrows stamp money to mail her a proposal. Morticia dons a beard and poses as the mother to convince Fester that he will have to work to support a wife.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Because she thinks Fester (Jackie Coogan) and Grandmama (Blossom Rock) are spoiling the children, Morticia (Carolyn Jones) hires a governess. Insulted, Fester paints a white line down the center of the Addams house, dividing it in half.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez see Fester conferring with TV muscleman Jack LaGrann (Jack LaLanne), and think that Fester is planning a television career. However, Uncle Fester confides to Lurch that he has to go on a secret diet and exercise.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez find Grandfather Pegleg's treasure map and summon Captain Grimby. They hope to charter his boat for the treasure hunt. But after meeting the Captain, Morticia is careful to keep the nature of the mission secret.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Ophelia Frump is madly in love with Horatio Bartholomew, the man who has everything, except the truth about her relatives. Morticia, not convinced by Bartholomew, persuades playboy Cousin Itt to stir the embers of his past romance with Ophelia.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Pugsley shocks his parents when he gives up his new atomic reactor as kid stuff and announces that he wants to find his own job. His first try is as a medical assistant to Dr. Bird. He turns up, scalpel in hand, ready to help during an operation.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandma Frump (guest star Margaret Hamilton), comes to the mistaken conclusion that her daughter, Morticia (Carolyn Jones), and Gomez (John Astin) plan to pack her off to an old folks home. Actually, they plan to send her to a beauty farm.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia, in order to be part of the National Beautification Program, decides to become a home decorator and offers her services to the neighbors. Next door neighbor, and insurance agent, Joe Digby hires Morticia in hopes of selling them insurance.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Ophelia taunts Uncle Fester into announcing that he is going to join the Peace Corps. Fester feels he's a cinch to be accepted because Gomez plans to pull strings in Washington on his behalf. The entire family agrees to help him study for the exam.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Allyn Joslyn guest-stars as Sam Hilliard, a former truant officer who now heads a private school where Wednesday and Pugsley are enrolled. When Hilliard breaks under the strain of dealing with the Addams children, Gomez buys the school.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Dr. Marvin P. Gunderson is summoned to examine Kitty Kat, the ailing lion pet of the Addams Family. Morticia decides that it is the doctor who needs help. To build his confidence, human members of the family pretend to be ill so he can effect cures.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's concern that Lurch is overworked leads Gomez to the operating table to assemble a custom-built secondary butler. Lurch lets the robot do all the work and then begins to feel that he isn't needed anymore.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Uncle Fester incinerates the family's stuffed bear with his flamethrower, Morticia reports the accident to the insurance company. Mr. Henson the head of the company, sends his assistant, Mr. Digby, to handle the case.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch suffers from unrequited love over Tiny Trivia (guest star Diane Jergens), Morticia's visiting school chum who only has eyes for show business. The entire family decides to try to turn their stolid butler into a new personality.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Ophelia laments that she has been jilted, Morticia suggests a career as an alternative to marriage. She tries chemistry first (with explosive results) then turns to operatic singing. Cousin Itt is summoned to coach her to stardom.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The seven remaining teams depart from their Pit Stop at the Siberian Colosseum, leaving the cold of Siberia and flying nearly 2,000 miles to the heat of Jaipur, India.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The six remaining teams set off from the Jaigur Fort in Jaipur, India and receive a clue instructing them to fly nearly 2,000 miles to Phuket, Thailand.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The remaining five teams take off from their Pit Stop at the Wat Thep Nimit Temple in Phuket, Thailand and receive a clue instructing them to fly over 400 miles to Bangkok, Thailand.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The five remaining teams set off from the eighth Pit Stop at a royal palace in Bangkok, Thailand and receive a clue instructing them to travel over 1,000 miles to Guilin, China.

programme.title: The Amazing Race

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Animal Adventures

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Animal Adventures

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: On this adventure, Jack takes you on whirlwind trip, from his home at the Columbus Zoo, to some of his favorite destinations in Africa, Australia and Florida.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Life in the Slow Lane
programme.desc: Today’s countdown is all about animals that know how to take it easy, from mellow mammals like manatees and koalas to relaxed reptiles like the giant Galapagos tortoise. Kick back, relax and take a ride in the slow lane!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Animal Adventures
programme.desc: After her floatplane touches down on Kulik Lake, Jack's daughter, Kathaleen, joins him in the Katmai region of Alaska for some brown bear watching and fly-fishing.

programme.desc: Come along on today’s adventure to Australia’s Great Barrier Reef, Kenya’s Masai Mara, Panama’s Forest Canopy and many more amazing animal ecosystems, as Jack counts them down all the way to number one!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Animal Adventures
programme.desc: Jack accompanies four Florida manatees on a long distance flight from Sea World, Orlando to the Columbus Zoo in Ohio.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Top Conservation Heroes
programme.desc: Come along on this adventure as Jack counts down his heroes! From legends in the conservation world… to everyday folks who have dedicated their lives to animals, meet people who are making a difference for animals, like elephants, rhinos, horses and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Animal Adventures

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: Everyone is a suspect when a passenger goes missing about the Pacific Princess. Meanwhile, when Julie's high-school friend boards the ship with her son, they learn an important lesson after running into the woman's father and another passenger.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: A carnival entrepreneur is approached on the Pacific Princess by a woman who knows a shocking secret about his past. Meanwhile, a comedy duo with a bear act competes for the affection of the same woman.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: On a Hong Kong cruise: a senator romances a woman until he learns the nature of her visit; two brothers date Julie and Vicki; a compulsive shopper is offered $25,000 by her husband (Herb Edelman) if she'll resist temptation during the trip.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: An international fugitive finds love when he meets a beautiful woman with a secret, while a divorcee meets an intriguing man who conceals his identity from her and Isaac.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: A rich widow comes face to face with her estranged sister, who's working on the ship as a made and whose boyfriend the wealthy woman stole and married 40 years earlier. Meanwhile, a childless couple hatches a plan to become parents.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: A man bound by alimony wants to make sure his ex (Michelle Phillips) goes through with her marriage; Julie's Aunt Sylvia and her pal Betsy try to interest a publisher in Betsy's memoirs.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: Isaac's budding relationship with a new crew member becomes complicated when Gopher tells him to fire her. Meanwhile, a congressman and his wife bring their daughter aboard the Pacific Princess after receiving letters threatening her young life.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: A gambling cruise for charity proves a chancy thing for a teacher (McLean Stevenson), two honeymooners (Shea Farrell, Leah Ayres), and the drive chairwoman (Celeste Holm). Richard Jaeckel, Antony Ponzini, Jo Ann Pflug, Gavin MacLeod.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: Captain Stubing hires a handsome new photographer who draws the attention of two sisters who were visiting Doc and Gopher. Then, a young man is shocked to meet his mother's (Lee Meriwether) new boyfriend, who is the same age as him.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: An inventor's zealousness jeopardizes his chance for romance and a man's double identity upsets Julie and a passenger.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: A boy who thinks his grandmother (Glynis Johns) is terminally ill will do anything to ensure her happiness; a man (Ed Begley Jr.) who's uncomfortable around women falls in love with a mermaid (Mary Crosby).

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: A bevy of beauties, including a stunning new cruise director, board the Pacific Princess for an all-woman voyage to Alaska.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Arson fires are set for their own sake, or to cover a different crime, such as murder. Think fire consumes all vital clues? Think again. Arson investigators can glean important clues from scorched rubble and ignite the unquenchable flames of justice.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: When a victim is gunned down at point-blank range, police often assume that a friend or acquaintance is to blame.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Drowning deaths often look like accidents and water can destroy the scant clues the killer may have left behind. Investigators must turn to forensic science to solve cases where the victim is found dead in the water.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Drug trafficking has spawned a violent and deadly criminal underground. It's providing a challenge to forensic investigators devoted to cracking drug rings.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Lies and deceit can often throw investigators off the trail of justice. But when hard evidence contradicts a killer's story, police must use the clues to piece together the truth.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: At the scene of a murder, sometimes the victim provides the only clues to their killer. Forensic anthropologists use skeletal remains to decipher the clues written in the bones.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: When killers hide or destroy the remains of their victims, it becomes the mission of forensic scientists to reconstruct the scenes and prove murder for an absent witness.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Profiles the work of world-renowned forensic experts and the procedures they use to solve murders and other mysteries in minutes or centuries after they happen.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Most victims of multiple murderers are meticulously chosen because of a mutual connection with the killer or because they match an intricate set of criteria that fits the killer's MO.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: New Forensic Techniques used to Solve Old Cases: Advancement in science and technology are encouraging people to revisit the past in hopes of answering questions that have remained unanswered, and solving crimes that seemed unsolvable.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Missing Person: Approximately 1.8 million Americans are reported missing each year. Worldwide, the number of missing persons nearly triples.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Accidental deaths, suicides, disappearances, and fires; they're an everyday part of an insurance investigator's life. But cases shouldn't be taken at face value. Forensics has become a tool for exposing insurance fraud.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: When a theft is committed, something valuable is stolen. But when a criminal needs a new identity, theft becomes a matter of life and death.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: In most homicides, police rely on motive to pursue a murderer. But when the killer is a stranger…the crime may go unsolved for years. It takes a full arsenal of forensic techniques…to trace… a lethal encounter.

programme.desc: A mysterious guardian helps a tiny community survive after the Bomb destroys much of the Earth.

programme.desc: Barbara accidentally causes her cruel Uncle Simon's death. His will stipulates that she must care for his latest invention - a robot. The robot begins to take on Uncle Simon's traits.

programme.desc: The lone survivors of two annihilated worlds are stranded on a distant planet.

programme.desc: A man finds that he can trade anything he has, including youth and personality, with anybody else.

programme.desc: A ventriloquist's dummy goads him into committing burglaries.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone

programme.title: The Twilight Zone

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Assorted enemies pressure Rick and the group; the survivors and the prison may reach a breaking point.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Following his defeat at Woodbury, the Governor wanders aimlessly until he encounters a family in need.

programme.title: The Walking Dead

programme.title: The Walking Dead

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick and Carl look for shelter while Rick deals with old wounds; those left at the prison consider whether survival alone will be enough.

programme.title: The Walking Dead

programme.desc: Rick faces a number of threats while Carl and Michonne look for supplies; Glenn and Tara meet strangers on an important missio; other group members deal with their pasts.

programme.title: The Walking Dead

programme.title: The Walking Dead

programme.desc: Daryl struggles to fit in with his new group while Glenn finds Maggie's messages and races to catch up to her.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick leads a risky mission for a possible small reward when the supplies run low and the group's mistrust of people grows.

programme.title: Floyd Mayweather vs Manny Pacquiao
programme.desc: On May 2nd, 2015, Floyd Mayweather fought Manny Pacquiao in what was labeled as the "Fight of the Century." Floyd Mayweather emerged victorious via a unanimous decision, showcasing his exceptional defensive skills against Pacquiao's aggressive style.

programme.title: Top Rank Classics

programme.title: T.I. and Tiny: The Family Hustle

programme.title: T.I. and Tiny: The Family Hustle

programme.title: T.I. and Tiny: The Family Hustle
programme.desc: Tip notices the kids are missing out on certain skills he got from his old neighborhood. Trying to toughen them up, they hit the boxing gym where Major tries to take on his older brother. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: T.I. and Tiny: The Family Hustle
programme.desc: After King's pet hamster passes away, the kids beg their dad for a dog. When Tameka makes an interesting offer on behalf of the children, Tip puts the kids through a test to see if they are responsible enough for a dog. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: T.I. and Tiny: The Family Hustle

programme.title: T.I. and Tiny: The Family Hustle

programme.title: T.I. and Tiny: The Family Hustle

programme.title: T.I. and Tiny: The Family Hustle

programme.title: T.I. and Tiny: The Family Hustle

programme.title: T.I. and Tiny: The Family Hustle

programme.title: T.I. and Tiny: The Family Hustle

programme.title: Follow the Rules

programme.title: Basketball Wives LA

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Former WOW World Champion Santana Garrett gets emotional as she recounts her long journey back to WOW and why this road back means so much.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Ariel Sky fights for her freedom against her former trainer Coach Campanelli in the high stakes Freedom Match. Will Ariel be able to decide her own fate and prove her worth, or will Coach Campanelli continue pulling the strings?

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: It's the high-flying debut of the bahamian beauty Sierra Breeze as she must battle Penelope Pink.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Newly crowned WOW World Champion: The Beast has finally established that she's the top of the WOW roster, but with so many predators on the hunt for gold, how long can she hold on?

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Following The Brat Pack's vicious turn on one of their own Lil J Boogie, Stephy Slays teams up to help Lil J Boogie stand up to her bullies in the ring. Reina Del Rey goes head to head with Tormenta in the Main Event.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Siren the Voodoo Doll and Chainsaw are sent into the ring by Angelica Dante to battle the sunny Spring Break 24/7's Crystal Waters and Sandy Shore. In the Main Event, Princess Aussie clashes with fellow Australian, Superhero Genesis.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The unrelenting team of Top Tier starts the night facing The Dojo Defenders who have recruited Sierra Breeze. The All American Girls are back in the ring battling Las Bandidas. In a Main Event, reigning champion The Beast takes on The Classmaster.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: It's an action packed opening match as former champion Penelope Pink battles Tiki Chamorro. Lil J-Boogie makes her way as a singles competitor against Ice Cold. Lana Star's Fabulous Four take on The Tonga Twins in the Main Event.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Samantha Smart assures her team of The Classmaster and The Disciplinarian are ready to challenge The Mother Truckers for their championship in the Main Event. The All American Girls and Ariel Sky set out to beat their bullies in the ring.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Princess Aussie and Tormenta battle Laurie and Lindsey Carlson in the opening match. The WOW World Championship Title Match is here as The Beast must prove she can withstand the force of Penelope Pink who has been gearing up to reclaim her title.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Americana and Santana Garrett take on Goldie Collins and Katarina Jinx. Lil J-Boogie has an opportunity to prove herself against Coach Campanelli. Las Bandidas get their shot at the tag team championship title as they battle The Mother Truckers.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: It's a 6-person tag team match up when Lana Star sends her fabulous team of Penelope Pink and Miami's Sweet Heat to fight The Tonga Twins and Tiki Chamorro. The Beast must defend her championship title against Tormenta in the WOW Main Event.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Gigi Gianni and BK Rhythm take on Crystal Waters and Sandy Shore. It's Stephy Slays turn to battle one of Coach Campanelli's lackeys, Gloria Glitter. In the Main Event, Chainsaw and Siren The Voodoo Doll take on champions The Mother Truckers.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Jessie Jones is back in the ring for a title shot against The Beast. Teammates Pep Riley and Sasha Sparks vie for a top spot in WOW as they fight Las Bandidas. A rematch is set WOW's biggest Australian Superheroes Genesis and Princess Aussie.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: It's on to level three as Yugi and his friends are transported to a lava-covered wasteland. To make matters worse, Joey is possessed by an evil force, and destroying it may mean destroying Joey as well.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi and his friends are faced with an impossible task: locating a magical apple in a forest full of apple trees.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The gang stumbles upon a small kingdom dominated by a clan of fierce dragons known as The Fiendish Five. If they fail to slay these beasts, one of Yugi's friends must give up his soul!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi and his friends defeat the Fiendish Five…or so they think. These ferocious dragons have merged together and are now more powerful than ever!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Although the gang has passed the five sacred trials, the most dangerous test is yet to come. Now Yugi must face the spirit of Alexander the Great in an all-out Capsule Monsters war with the ultimate stakes!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi's friends are unconscious, leaving him to defeat Alexander the Great on his own!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Grandpa found the Millennium Puzzle decades ago, but little is known about the terrors, traps, turmoil, and treachery he faced to find the ancient artifact! See how it all began as we learn how Grandpa unearthed the Millennium Puzzle.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The evil spirit within the Millennium Ring has reunited with Bakura, prepped with a new monster to create the ultimate Shadow Game. And his first target is Kaiba!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi and friends go to the dawn of the duel, to the place where it all began, to the land where the Pharaoh's mysteries lie: Egypt.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The past is quickly becoming perilous as the fearless bandit king Bakura has invaded the Pharaoh's palace to take down the keepers of the seven Millennium Items single-handedly!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Even with the potent power of Obelisk the Tormentor, the Pharaoh couldn't prevent the bandit Bakura from escaping. Everyone knows that thief will return for a rematch, so Seto has a plan to create a powerful army.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Mahad vows to stop the bandit king Bakura's sneak attacks once and for all, but he may have made a promise he can't keep!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Mahad, the first of the Pharaoh's guardians, has fallen. Even worse, the bandit king Bakura now has the Millennium Ring, making his Diabound even more unstoppable!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The origins of the Millennium Items are revealed! Who forged these powerful artifacts, and why were they created? Though the Millennium Items are powerful, such power comes with a heavy price... a debt that may never be able to be repaid!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The Pharaoh calls forth the mighty Egyptian God Slifer the Sky Dragon to fight the bandit Bakura's Diabound, but when Diabound starts attacking the townspeople, the Pharaoh must protect them, even if it means sacrificing himself!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The bandit Bakura has stolen the Millennium Puzzle and sent the Pharaoh plummeting into the abyss. Now he's another step closer to obtaining all seven Millennium Items and resurrecting the malevolent Zorc, the greatest evil of all time!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi and the Pharaoh are reunited, but the Pharaoh is powerless without the Millennium Puzzle! However, that won't stop the Pharaoh from a final showdown against the bandit king Bakura.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: It's the showdown in the sands between the bandit Bakura and his ever-growing Diabound versus the Pharaoh, Mahad the Dark Magician, and the remaining guardians of the Pharaoh!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: With the help of his father's spirit, the Pharaoh and his guardians defeated the bandit Bakura's Diabound and stopped the horrible Zorc from resurrecting... or did they?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The Pharaoh's journey was more than a trip to the past, it's the greatest Shadow Game ever created. Yami Yugi and Yami Bakura's Shadow Game has already reached apocalyptic proportions, but it's only the beginning of cataclysmic events!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Zorc's incredible shadow energies have resurrected the bandit Bakura and his Diabound. With a second chance at revenge, the bandit king has broken up the Pharaoh's team so that he can divide and conquer them one at a time!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The hope of mankind rests on Yugi's shoulders as he arrives at the final temple chamber where the Pharaoh's name is located, but something unexpected is waiting for them - a sinister surprise that can cost them their lives!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: After a nearly eternal slumber, the all-powerful Zorc has resurrected, plunging the world into darkness!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The Pharaoh and his guardians are down to their last line of defense as Shada falls victim to Zorc. The Pharaoh desperately wants to summon the three Egyptian Gods, but he can't without his Millennium Puzzle!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Exodia the Forbidden One couldn't defeat Zorc! Exodia was able to buy enough time for the Pharaoh to get his Millennium Puzzle back-he can now summon the almighty Egyptian Gods! It's time for the Pharaoh's counterattack in the biggest brawl.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The three Egyptian Gods have been defeated. The Pharaoh is severely hurt and unable to stop Zorc from setting fire to the city, but our heroes aren't giving up. It's not double vision when Seto and Kaiba transcend time to confront Zorc.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The Pharaoh and Kaiba's combined strength couldn't defeat Zorc. Yugi must give the Pharaoh his name, but Yugi doesn't know how to read ancient Egyptian text. All bets are off in the final clash where Yugi must protect the past to save the future!
